#### Important Upgrade Notes



An issue was found on the current implementation of the upgrade command. Please see the following page for more details:
[Upgrading SuiteCRM 8 \- Section Possible Issues when Upgrading](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/installation-guide/upgrading/#_possible_issues_when_upgrading)




Documentation added on how to configure sessions in SuiteCRM 8\. See [here.](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/configuration/Sessions-Configuration)

* PR: [108](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/108) \- Fix [\#98](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/98) \- Fix install error
* PR: [107](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/107) \- Fix [\#106](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/106) \- Add session\_dir init check
* PR: [102](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/102) \- Fix [\#101](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/101) \- Parsing Error in UserHandler

## 8\.1\.1




*Released 24/05/2022*




### Assets



* [Github \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.1.1)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes




Important: This release includes critical security fixes, we strongly recommend users of older versions to update as soon as possible






#### Important Upgrade Notes



* New entries were added to the config. Please make sure to run `Rebuild Config File` located in the Administration \> Repair menu
* Php session\_gc is now force enabled by default.




	+ This option can be disabled by setting enable within the session\_gc array to false in config.php
	+ The values for session.gc\_probability and session.gc\_divisor can be changed in the following config.php entries within the session\_gc array
	
	
	
	
		- gc\_probability
		- gc\_divisor
	+ Check php documentation for more information on these settings <https://www.php.net/manual/en/session.configuration.php>
	+ If you are using a session\_dir other than the default, please make sure to have session\_gc enabled. Otherwise session files won’t be cleaned.
	+ If you are using debian or ubuntu based systems, and you have the default session\_dir (which fallsback to the system default),
	you may want to set enable within session\_gc array to false, as that is the default value for these systems.
	They have replacements for the php session\_gc. Please review your system’s defaults before making any changes.





In\-app configuration for `session save-path` is not supported yet in SuiteCRM 8\. It is scheduled to be added on a future release.







#### Security



* CVE: Pending \- SQL Injection Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- SQL Injection Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- SQL Injection Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Improper Access Control
* CVE: Pending \- RCE and CSRF Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Authenticated Bypass Vulnerability





#### Enhancements \& Bug Fixes



* PR: [95](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/95) \- Fix [\#53](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/53) \- Remove hardcoded dependency to en\_us language. Fix error when en\_us is disabled
* PR: [91](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/91) \- Fix [\#90](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/90) \- Fix logout. Fix need to refresh after logout
* PR: [89](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/89) \- Fix [\#86](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/86) \- Fix date filter operator mapping. Fix date filter operators
* PR: [88](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/88) \- Fix [\#87](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/87) \- Fix language selection. Fix language selection being reset after login
* PR: [84](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/84) \- Fix [\#30](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/30) \- Fix ApiBeanMapper id and link mapping. Fix custom relationship links
* PR: [80](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/80) \- Fix [\#78](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/78) \- Subpanel close button issues. Fix subpanel close button that was leading to duplicate subpanels
* PR: [9577](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9577) \- Update TinyMCE
* PR: [9583](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9583) \- Fix AOR\_Report Unit Tests
* PR: [9578](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9578) \- Update Jquery JS Libraries
* PR: [8599](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/8599) \- Auto\-close success message boxes in ModuleBuilder
* PR: [9584](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9584) \- Fix [SCRM\-Core\#87](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/87) \- Prevent disabling the default language
* PR: [9523](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9523) \- Fix [\#9438](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9438) \- Adding Action keyword to fieldname exception
* PR: [9495](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9495) \- Fix [\#9494](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9494) \- Force displaying line breaks to textarea fields
* PR: [9580](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9580) \- Fix [\#9435](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9435) \- Dropdown doesn’t return empty selected value
* PR: [9522](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9522) \- Fix [\#9435](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9435) \- Dropdown doesn’t return empty selected value
* PR: [9589](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9589) \- Fix [\#9530](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9530) \- Fallback to allowed\_preview defaults
* PR: [9581](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9581) \- Fix [\#3157](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3157) \- Add default option to enable session\_gc
* PR: [9582](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9582) \- Fix [\#9437](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9437) \- Default cookie path





#### Styling



* General Styling Fixes




	+ Accounts Duplicate Screen
	+ Surveys
	+ Outbound Dialog and Editview
	+ Password Management
	+ Case Settings
	+ Language Desktop
	+ Roles Dropdown
	+ Maps QuickRadius
* Mobile Styling Fixes




	+ History Subpanel
	+ Activity Stream
	+ Business Hours
	+ Connector Settings
	+ Admin Language
	+ System Settings
	+ Display Modules Settings

## 8\.1\.0




*Released 24/03/2022*




### Assets



* [Github \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.1.0)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)

### Release Notes



#### Enhancements \& Bug Fixes



* Add Recently Viewed Functionality




	+ Display Recently Viewed in the Navbar
* Add Favourites Functionality




	+ Display Favourites in the Navbar
	+ Add Favourite Flag to RecordView
* Disable Legacy Actions




	+ Alerts
	+ Recently Viewed
	+ Favourites Loading
	+ LDAP Settings
	+ SAML Settings
* Add HTML field to RecordView
* Permanently store User’s Preferences for ListView UI changes




	+ Table Sort Preferences
	+ Column Chooser Preferences
	+ Insight Preferences
	+ Filter Preferences
* Permanently store User’s Preferences for RecordView UI changes




	+ Subpanel Open/Close Preferences
	+ Subpanel Insights Open/Close Preferences
	+ Subpanel Order Preferences
* Performance Enhancements




	+ Delay splash screen for quicker performance
* Trim event invite links





#### Styling



* Favourite Star Styling
* Update styling for User Wizard on mobile devices
* Style Merge Records classic view
* Update Admin Settings Styling




	+ Locale updated on mobile devices
	+ ElasticSearch updated on mobile devices
	+ Search updated on mobile devices
	+ Sales updated on mobile devices
	+ Currency updated on mobile devices
	+ System Settings updated on mobile devices
	+ PDF Settings styling updated
* General Styling Changes




	+ Print PDF Settings popup
	+ Email Confirmation popup
	+ Campaigns
	+ Calendar Popup
	
	
	
	
		- Invitee Panel updated to SuiteCRM8 Styling
	+ Email Templates
	+ Workflow
	
	
	
	
		- Fix Actions, Email \& Calendar Styling
	+ Projects
	
	
	
	
		- Resource Panel Buttons \& Fields Updated to SuiteCRM8 View
	+ Maps Config
	+ Event Delegate Subpanel

# 8\.2 Releases





## 8\.2\.4




*Released 02/03/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.2.4)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Documentation



* We have added a page specifically for system performance enhancements within SuiteCRM 8\. See more information [here.](../../installation-guide/performance)
* We have also updated the `.htaccess` documentation regarding the values set for `RewriteBase`. See more [here.](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)





#### Security



* CVE: Pending \- RCE Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Stored XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Stored XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- SSRF Vulnerability





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [203](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/203) \- Fix [\#202](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/202) \- CSRFCookieListener: remove RouteMatcherInterface type property to $routeMatcher
* PR: [222](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/222) \- Fix [\#206](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/206) \- Email Subject Line
* PR: [9666](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9666) \- Fix [\#9665](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9665) \- Set unique id for "Reset module" button in studio
* PR: [9742](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9742) \- Fix Closing count bracket before relational operator PHP 8\.0 count throwing TypeError
* PR: [9751](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9751) \- Fix [\#9750](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9750) \- Receive related parameters of type dynamicenum in workflow formulas
* PR: [9796](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9796) \- Fix [\#4646](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4646) \- Hard coded messages in Surveys module
* PR: [9836](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9836) \- Fix [\#9835](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9835) \- Case Updates save bug
* PR: [9872](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9872) \- Fix [\#9871](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9871) \- Javascript message error when bulk updating all user records
* PR: [9874](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9874) \- Fix [\#9873](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9873) \- Plesk php.ini disable\_functions \= opcache\_get\_status
* PR: [9882](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9882) \- Fix OPCache install module copy action
* PR: [9884](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9884) \- Fix [\#9883](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9883) \- Security Groups do not work with modules whose name exceeds 36 characters.
* PR: [9910](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9910) \- Fix [\#9909](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9909) \- Default empty item when creating a new Dropdown field
* PR: [9914](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9914) \- Close \#9914 \- Update dashboard.scss for dashlet options overflow
* PR: [9955](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9955) \- Fix [\#9926](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9926) \- Add missing check on product image upload
* PR: [9901](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9901) \- Fix [\#9900](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9900) \- Conditions doesn’t recognize some of the characters set
* PR: [9954](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9954) \- Fix Campaign Parenthesis
* PR: [9813](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9813) \- Fix [\#9344](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9344) \- Error in Browsers console after adding tabs to Quickcreate: function selectTabOnError

*Released 25/01/2023*

### Release Notes



#### Documentation



* SuiteCRM 8\.2\.3 now has an updated Email Compose From dropdown. This includes some styling and functionality changes.
For more information see [here.](../../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/email-compose-from-list)





#### Security



* CVE: [2022\-45185](https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2022-45185) \- Improper Access Control
* CVE: Pending \- SQL Injection
* CVE: Pending \- Improper Access Control
* CVE: Pending \- Improper Access Control
* CVE: Pending \- Improper Access Control
* CVE: Pending \- Bypass Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Vulnerability: Cross Site Scripting

* PR: [9905](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9905) \- Close \#9905 \- Update email compose from dropdown
* PR: [9904](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9904) \- Fix [9879](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9878) \- Fix inbound email errors on php 8

## 8\.2\.2




*Released 22/12/2022*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.2.2)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)




#### Enhancements



* PR: [9839](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9839) \- Close \#9839 \- Add OAuth connection to Inbound emails
* PR: [9848](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9848) \- Close \#9848 \- Add OAuth external providers module
* PR: [9846](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9846) \- Close \#9846 \- Add ACL Access Logic Hook





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [9802](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9802) \- Close \#9802 \- Diagnostic Checkbox
* PR: [9718](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9718) \- Fix [\#9717](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9717) \- Security Suite Group Selector doesn’t appear when duplicating records
* PR: [9648](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9648) \- Fix [\#9646](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9646) \- Display TinyMCE in Campaigns Form Wizard
* PR: [9643](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9643) \- Fix [\#9574](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9574) \- Update method to static for module renaming
* PR: [9500](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9500) \- Fix [9499](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9499) \- Add View Survey Responses Menu item
* PR: [9638](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9638) \- Close \#9683 \- Elasticsearch indexing and searching using accented characters
* PR: [9474](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9474) \- Fix [\#9473](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9473) \- Missing item "Survey" in campainglog\_activity\_type\_dom
* PR: [9844](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9844) \- Close \#9844 \- ElasticSearch Indexing batch error handling
* PR: [9770](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9770) \- Fix [\#9568](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9568) \- Ignore int len when comparing vardefs in newer MySQL versions
* PR: [9786](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9786) \- Close \#9786 \- Clear caches used by Inline Edition
* PR: [9671](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9671) \- Fix [\#9670](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9670) \- Disabling the user profile option about notification of assignments does not work




In this release there has been an incredible update to Emails including the following;






### Update External OAuth Connection Module



* Add `ExternalOAuthConnection` module to allow getting access through OAuth from external providers.
* Allow setting up Security groups for `ExternalOuthConnections` Emails.
* Configure Microsoft connection provider using a configuration similar to the following:




![OAuth Microsoft Connection](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/suite8-oauth-provider.png)





### Updates to Inbound Emails Module



* Update Inbound Email Views are now identical to other modules.
* Allow the creation of Personal, Group and Bounce mail accounts through create/edit views.
* Allow Security Groups to be set for Inbound Emails.
* Allow the select between `basic` and `oauth connection` on Inbound Email create/edit views.
* Allow selecting an external oauth connection as the connection to use for authenticating in Inbound Emails.




![Inbound OAuth Configuration](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/suite8-oauth-connection.png)




* Remove Inbound Email configuration from profile view.





### Update Outbound Emails Module



* Allow creating personal Outbound email accounts through Outbound Email module views.
* Allow Security Groups to be set for Outbound Emails.
* Remove Outbound Email configuration from profile view.





### Update IMAP connection library \| Allow connecting with xoauth



* Add imap2 lib to handle in order to support xoauth login in imap.
* Add Imap2Handler to be used to connect to IMAP for Oauth connections.





### Other



* SAML: re\-direct to logged\-out page when attribute is mis\-configured




#### Documentation



* Configure Security Groups for Inbound Email [here](../../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/inboundemail-securitygroups).
* Setup a Microsoft OAuth Provider [here](../../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/microsoft-oauth-provider-howto).
* Configure Inbound Email with OAuth [here](../../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/inboundemail-oauth-howto).
* External OAuth Provider Overview [here](../../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/oauth-provider-overview).






### Known Issues



* Issue: [\#9852](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9852) \- New "Move to trash" toggle causing Case Updates to not import
* Issue: [\#9853](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9853) \- Case Macro not populated on Upgrade
* Issue: [\#9855](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9855) \- When a personal oauth connection is used for a group inbound email, the emails break
* Issue: [\#9856](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9856) \- Email listview filtering shows blank result if a criteria with multiple words and spaces is added
* Issue: [\#9857](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9857) \- Email listview filtering shows blank result for IMAP keywords criteria
* Issue: [\#9854](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9854) \- Test settings issue after switching between OAuth and Basic Auth
* Issue: [\#9858](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9858) \- Group Inbound Emails distribution\_method field is reset when Editing the record again
* Issue: [\#9867](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9867) \- Inbound Email’s "SSL" checkbox does not retain Checked status after Upgrade




#### Styling



* Legacy Styling Changes




	+ UserProfile Layout Tab Styling Fixes
	+ Admin Advanced Tab Restyling Fixes
	+ Studio Module Builder Styling Fixes
	+ Firefox Dropdown Styling Fixes
	+ ListView Pagination Styling Fixes
	+ Case Modules Styling Fixes
	+ Admin Password Page Restyling Fixes
	+ Editview Buttons Styling Fixes for Mobile
	+ Import Listview Pagination Arrow Styling Fixes
	+ Import Page Styling Fixes
	+ Action Dropdown Detailview Styling Fixes
	+ Upload Button Alignment Styling Fixes
	+ User/Administrator Text Styling Fixes
	+ User Wizard Welcome Page styling fixes
	+ Reminders Panel Styling Fixes






### Community

We will continue to enhance SuiteCRM 8 with new features and improvements, the latest of which can be found on our [Road Map](https://suitecrm.com/suitecrm-roadmap/).




In the meantime, if you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have a suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues). Before raising an issue please be sure to check the [Release Notes and list of Known Issues](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/releases/).




If you want to get involved or submit a Fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit An PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Check the following documentation page for more information on how to upgrade between SuiteCRM 8 versions [Upgrading documentation](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/installation-guide/upgrading/)




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)




More information regarding our Security Process can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/community/raising-issues/#_security).

* PR: [9675](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9675) \- Fix [\#9674](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9674) \- Error when importing (creating and updating) a record with ID already deleted in the database
* PR: [9689](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9689) \- Fix [\#9688](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9688): Use the same browser title for the regular views
* PR: [9699](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9699) \- Fix [\#9698](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9698) \- Do not delete the subject when editing a tracking url from the campaign assistant

## 8\.2\.0




*Released 11/10/2022*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.2.0)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Documentation



* Add 7\.12\.x to 8\.x migration documentation \- [7\.12 Migration Documentation](../../../../8.x/admin/legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)
* Add step to check config and htaccess to install documentation \- [Installation Documentation](../../../../8.x/admin/installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* Update 8\.x upgrade guide with new upgrade steps \- [Upgrade Documentation](../../../../8.x/admin/installation-guide/upgrading)





#### Enhancements




#### SuiteCRM 7\.12\.x to SuiteCRM 8 Migration



* A migration path from version 7\.12\+ to 8\.x has been added. Please see the following documentation page for instructions on how to upgrade [here.](../../../../8.x/admin/legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





#### LDAP and SAML Authentication



Authentication with LDAP and SAML (including SAML’s user auto creation) has been added, to make it easier to access SuiteCRM by using the same credentials that you may use to access other applications.




To see how to setup and configure the authentication methods, please see the following documentation:




* [LDAP Setup and Configuration](../../../../8.x/admin/configuration/ldap-configuration/)
* [SAML Setup and Configuration](../../../../8.x/admin/configuration/saml-configuration/)





#### Duplicate View



When duplicating a record, you will now see the ‘Create’ page for that module:




![Duplicate View](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/duplicate-view.png)





#### Bulk Select Subpanel



When viewing a subpanel, the Link option has replaced the Select option from the actions drop down. Similar to the Select option, this option will display a pop\-up window where one or more records can be selected, to associate with the parent record.




![Bulk Select](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/BulkSelect.png)





#### History Timeline



When viewing the History timeline, you are now able to click on an entry to view the related record’s detail:




![History Timeline](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/history-timeline.png)





#### Bug Fixes




#### Graphql API



Previously when navigating to ‘http://myhost/index.php\#/accounts’ or ‘http://myhost/\#/accounts’, the API calls always pointed to ‘http://myhost/api/graphql’ incorrectly.
We have therefore updated this to ensure the Graphql calls point to the correct location pathname instead.





#### System Name



After changing the `System Name` setting in the System Settings, you will now see this change in the browser.





#### Top Widget Changes



Previously when viewing the top widgets, if there is no information the ‘\-’ character would be displayed. This has now been changed to make it clear there is no information to display.





#### History and Activity Subpanel Icons



Icons have been added to both the History and Activity subpanels to show which module a record is associated.





#### Github PR’s



* PR: [160](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/160) \- Fix [\#61](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/61) and [\#81](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/81) \- Allow user to see dates in their time and format





#### Styling



* Legacy Styling Changes




	+ Campaign Mobile Styling Fixes
	+ Email Settings Mobile Fixes
	+ Inbound Email Mobile Styling Fixes
	+ Email Queue Mobile Styling Fixes
	+ Save \& Cancel Button Overlapping Styling Fixes
	+ ListView Styling Changes \- Column Chooser \& Filter Fixes
	+ Document iframe page styling fixes
	+ Email Compose Field Width Styling Fixes
	+ Resource Calendar Styling Fixes
	+ Upload File Btn Styling Fixes
	+ Group User Page Styling Fixes
	+ Fix Roles Labels
	+ Timezone Modal Changes
	+ ActionDropdown Label updates
	+ Import VCard updates
	+ Outbound Email Mobile updates
* Other Styling Changes




	+ UserWizard Final Page Styling Fixes
	+ Subpanel Icons Styling Fixes
	+ Subpanel Dropdown Styling Fixes
	+ User Wizard Mobile Styling Fixes
	+ Update Security Group labels
	+ User Signature text alignment






### Community



*Special thanks to the following members for their contributions and participation in this release!*







[![eojedapilchik Avatar](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/eojedapilchik)](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/eojedapilchik)
[eojedapilchik](https://github.com/eojedapilchik)




[![jyotiraghav93 Avatar](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/jyotiraghav93)](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/jyotiraghav93)
[jyotiraghav93](https://github.com/jyotiraghav93)




[![mcube27 Avatar](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/mcube27)](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/mcube27)
[mcube27](https://github.com/mcube27)




[![bfoese Avatar](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/bfoese)](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/bfoese)
[bfoese](https://github.com/bfoese)






We hope you find these enhancements and improvements useful, and we look forward to any feedback you may have.




We will continue to enhance SuiteCRM 8 with new features and fixes and have outlined our short term [Road Map](https://suitecrm.com/suitecrm-roadmap/), which will provide an overview of things to come.




If you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have a suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues). Before raising an issue please be sure to check the [Release Notes and list of Known Issues](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/releases/).




If you want to get involved or submit a Fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit An PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Check the following documentation page for more information on how to upgrade between SuiteCRM 8 versions [Upgrading documentation](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/installation-guide/upgrading/)




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)




More information regarding our Security Process can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/community/raising-issues/#_security).

# 8\.3 Releases





## 8\.3\.1




*Released 11/07/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.3.1)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Upgrading




If your system is on a version lower than 8\.3\.0, you first need to upgrade to 8\.3\.0\. For more information about upgrades please see the [Upgrade Documentation.](../../upgrading)







#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-3627](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-3627) \- CSRF Vulnerability





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [268](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/268) \- Fix [\#267](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/267) \- Show activities dropdown labels with regular user
* PR: [239](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/239/) \- Fix [\#154](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/154) \- MySQL Error 1054: missing config.deleted columns
* PR: [265](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/265) \- Fix [\#196](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/196), [\#251](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/251) \- Fix parent\_type relate

* PR: [244](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/244) \- Fix query limit check for queries without limit on ListView record list

* PR: [9938](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9938) \- Fix [\#9937](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9937) \- Resolve high memory usage when performing bulk relationship changes
* PR: [10072](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10072) \- Fix [\#10034](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10034) \- Email Listview doesn’t render, so no Emails are visible

* PR: [10051](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10051) \- Add better description of what is being removed during module installation for ACLs

* PR: [\#9816](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9816) \- Item element getting called incorrectly
* PR: [10024](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10024) \- Fix [\#9601](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9601) \- Fix bug where report conditions parenthesis pairs would not save correctly
* PR: [10044](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10044) \- Fix [10029](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10029) \- Issues changing dashlets name
* PR: [9983](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9983) \- Fix [\#9516](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9516) \- getRelatedId returns null instead of a string
* PR: [9657](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9657) \- Fix [9654](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9654) \- different date formats being compared for change log
* PR: [10036](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10036) \- Fix [\#10033](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10033) \- PHP Fatal error Uncaught TypeError PHP8

In the meantime, if you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have a suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues). Before raising an issue please be sure to check the [Release Notes and list of Known Issues](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/releases/).




If you want to get involved or submit a Fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit An PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Check the following documentation page for more information on how to upgrade between SuiteCRM 8 versions [Upgrading documentation](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/installation-guide/upgrading/)




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)




More information regarding our Security Process can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/community/raising-issues/#_security).

## 8\.3\.0




*Released 16/05/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.3.0)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### System Requirement Changes




The minimum php version has been updated to php 7\.4\.






To visit the SuiteCRM 8\.3\.x Compatibility Matrix please see [here.](../../compatibility-matrix/)





#### Backward Incompatible Changes




There has been a BREAKING change update to the `Process Handler Interface`.






The `Process Handler Interface` now has the additional function `getRequiredACls` and thus any extension using this interface
will need to be updated accordingly.





#### New Dev Package



This release includes a new `SuiteCRM-8.3.0-dev.zip` dev package, which is available via [Github.](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.3.0)




This package is meant to help in the development of frontend extensions.




The only difference between the base package and the dev package, is that the dev package includes the `dist` folder.




Including the `dist` folder should remove the need to rebuild the core frontend code.




Please check the following pages for more information:




* [Developer Getting Started guide](../../../developer/developer-getting-started)
* [Extension Structure guide](../../../developer/extensions/extension-structure)





#### Documentation



##### Upgrading




If you wish to upgrade from 8\.0\.x / 8\.1\.x to a more current release, please read the following
[Upgrade Documentation.](../../upgrading)








#### Security



* CVE: Pending \- Stored XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Improper Access Control
* CVE: Pending \- Improper Access Control





#### Enhancements



##### Notifications



Notifications are now available in SuiteCRM 8, for the following activities:




* Meetings
* Calls




Therefore, if you are invited/assigned to one of the above, you will receive the notification and any subsequent reminders.
For more information on using the Notification features, please see [here.](../../../features/notifications/notifications)




![Notifications](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Notifications-Open.png)





##### Subpanel Filters



When viewing Subpanels, you are now able to filter the results to locate the records you are interested in.
To enable the Filter option, you need to add it via the 'subpaneldefs.php'. For further information on how to do this,
please see [here.](../../../features/filters/subpanel-filtering/subpanel-filtering)




![Subpanel Filter](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Filter-Full-Panel.png)





##### Load More



Previously in SuiteCRM 8, to view additional records on Listview, Subpanels and Pop up Record List you would need to use the paging options.




However, you can now choose to 'Load More' meaning the records all display on the one page, making it easier to scroll up
and down the list of records, rather than paging back and forth.




To find out how to switch this on and configure the settings, please see [here.](../../../features/load-more/load-more)




![Load More](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Load-More-Full.png)





##### Admin Page



SuiteCRM 8\.3 now has a new administration page.




![Admin Panel](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Admin-Panel-Top.png)




![Admin Panel Highlighted](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Admin-Panel-Highlighted.png)




SuiteCRM 8\.3 now has the ability to select any admin option from the NEW multi\-menu.




![Admin Panel Scheduler](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Admin-Panel-Scheduler.png)




To see more information or to read more about the options within the admin panel please see [here.](../../administration-panel/administration-panel/)





##### Hidden Column Display Button



SuiteCRM 8 now has the ability to see selected columns that do not appear on listview.




![ListView.png](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/ListView.png)




After Selecting the `Columns` action we see:




![Date-Create-CC.png](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Date-Create-CC.png)




We have the `Date Created` selected, however it’s not shown on the listview.




Any fields that are not shown on the list can be seen by selecting the three dots to the left of the record on the view.




![Date-Create-List.png](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Date-Create-List.png)






#### Styling List



* Legacy Styling Fixes




	+ Document Select Button Styling
	+ Dashlet Modal Styling
	+ Studio Export Customisation Styling
	+ Column Chooser Bottom Button
	+ Column Chooser Modal Styling
	+ User Management Styling
	+ Activity Stream Html Structure Styling
* Other Styling Changes




	+ Record Thread Button Styling





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [231](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/231) \- Fix [\#219](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/219) \- enum required field validation
* PR: [240](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/240) \- Fix [\#195](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/195) \- Initialize bean in app controller
* PR: [246](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/246) \- Fix [\#245](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/245) \- \[Legacy] Sugar\_html onclick action issues
* PR: [247](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/247) \- Fix [\#216](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/216) \- Filtering null values
* PR: [9542](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9542) \- Fix \#9542 \- PHP8 null values
* PR: [9812](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9812) \- Fix \#9812 \- Decimal number calculations
* PR: [9817](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9817) \- Fix \#9817 \- A typo in Campaign Trackers
* PR: [9828](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9828) \- Fix \#9828 \- $mod\_strings was not initiated
* PR: [9849](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9849) \- Fix \#9849 \- Email OAuth Saving with no type
* PR: [9974](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9974) \- Fix \#9974 \- allowed\_preview is defined twice
* PR: [9965](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9965) \- Fix \#9965 \- Upgrade league/oauth2\-server to latest version
* PR: [9642](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9642) \- Fix [\#9602](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9602) \- ProspectLists save function has a duplication issue
* PR: [9559](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9559) \- Fix [\#7759](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/7759), [\#8273](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8273) \- Double Compose button in subpanels
* PR: [10010](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10010) \- Fix [\#10009](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10009) \- Cannot configure Module Menu Filters on PHP8\+
* PR: [9325](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9325) \- Fix [\#9153](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9153) \- Adding dynamicenum case option for export
* PR: [9329](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9329) \- Fix [\#8897](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8897) \- Adding missing relationship for SurveyResponses module
* PR: [9471](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9471) \- Fix [\#9470](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9470) \- Set fdow in Calendar popup date selector for range search and MassUpdate
* PR: [9520](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9520) \- Fix [\#9326](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9326) \- Adding decimal and float case option for export
* PR: [9528](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9528) \- Fix [\#9476](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9476) \- Mass assign security groups only assigns selected on current page
* PR: [9622](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9622) \- Fix [\#9621](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9621) \- Workflows Calculate Field Actions don’t translate dynamicenum fields
* PR: [9765](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9765) \- Fix [\#9764](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9764) \- Add extra To addresses to CC field
* PR: [9777](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9777) \- Fix [\#9768](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9768) \- Do not convert link URLs in TinyMCE
* PR: [9784](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9784) \- Fix [\#9783](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9783) \- Compose view quick search for email templates
* PR: [9787](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9787) \- Fix [\#9780](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9780) \- New User Group Popup. Popup does not show after creating a user
* PR: [9876](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9876) \- Fix [\#9875](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9875) \- SugarFeed shows 0 seconds ago and negative interval for certain datetime formats
* PR: [9903](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9903) \- Fix [\#9902](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9902) \- Workflow \- Some Date calculations fail with certain formats






### Community



We would love to have your feedback and input to help make SuiteCRM 8 great for everyone.




*Special thanks to everyone who reported security issues addressed in this release!*

If you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have a suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues).




If you want to get involved and submit a fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit An PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Please [visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the appropriate upgrade package.




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)

# 8\.4 Releases





## 8\.4\.2




*Released 14/11/2023*




* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.4.2)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)




### Release Notes



#### Documentation



* We have added documentation on how to configure [trusted hosts](../../configuration/trusted-hosts-configuration).





#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6130](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6130) \- LFI to RCE Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6128](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6128) \- Reflected XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6131](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6131) \- Arbitrary File Upload to RCE
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6127](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6127) \- Import XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6126](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6126) \- Dashlet HTML Injection Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6125](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6125) \- PDF XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6124](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6124) \- SSRF Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- API Introspection Vulnerability





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [367](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/367) \- Fix [\#184](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/184) \- Bulk Action buttons not functioning
* PR: [359](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/359) \- Fix [\#301](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/301) \- Contact not showing in Activities \& history subpanel
* PR: [357](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/357) \- Fix [\#347](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/347) \- Validation on empty date fields
* PR: [356](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/356) \- Fix [\#305](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/305) \- Issue with dropdowns not displaying correctly in listviews/dashlets
* PR: [337](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/337) \- Fix [\#336](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/336) \- Lines fix for Crowdin
* PR: [360](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/360) \- Fix \#360 \- admin panel when grouping modules
* PR: [10253](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10253) \- Fix [\#10252](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10252) \- Google Maps Geocoded Counts not displaying properly
* PR: [10248](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10248) \- Fix [\#9537](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9537) \- Activity subpanel isn’t working in a module with a parent\_type / flex relate field
* PR: [10241](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10241) \- Fix [\#9898](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9898) \- Invalid cookie domain when using non\-standard HTTP Port
* PR: [9522](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9522) \- Fix [\#9435](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9435) \- Dropdown doesn’t return empty selected value
* PR: [10246](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10246) \- Fix \#10246 \- non\-admin’s outbound email link not showing
* PR: [10220](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10220) \- Fix \#10220 \- Add Email Body Filtering Selection
* PR: [10212](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10212) \- Fix [\#10199](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10199) \- PHP Fatal error: Uncaught Error: Non\-static method SugarWidgetReportField::\_get\_column\_select()
* PR: [10206](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10206) \- Fix [\#10205](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10205) \- Compatibility hotfix for PHP 8 in ActivitiesRelationship.php
* PR: [10201](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10201) \- Fix [\#9950](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9950) editing Email settings drops TLS SSL selection
* PR: [10160](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10160) \- Fix [\#10159](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10159) \- Accounts \- Not able to search by fax on 'Any Phone' search field
* PR: [10143](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10143) \- Fix \#10143 \- Update ready.php change checking of upload max filesize from \> to \>\=
* PR: [10142](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10142) \- Fix [\#10141](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10141) \- Orphaned Case Attachments bug
* PR: [10122](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10122) \- Fix [\#10115](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10115) \- Wokflow Calculate Action broken under PHP8
* PR: [10114](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10114) \- Fix [\#10114](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10114) \- parameter userTime method in class TimeDate
* PR: [10049](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10049) \- Fix \#10049 \- Relationship::delete expects a string
* PR: [10028](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10028) \- Fix \#10028 \- Allow workflow to send plain text emails
* PR: [10027](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10027) \- Fix \#10027 \- Respect wildcard in front when searching a full name in basic search
* PR: [9964](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9964) \- Fix [\#8980](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8980) \- Check beanFiles for class path
* PR: [9881](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9881) \- Fix [\#9880](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9880) \- Error when importing currency fields with a decimal separator
* PR: [9524](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9524) \- Fix [\#9440](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9440) \- Forcing default null value for numeric core fields
* PR: [9459](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9459) \- Fix [\#9456](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9456) \- choose email provider does not populate SMTP settings
* PR: [9413](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9413) \- Fix [\#9412](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9412) \- Wrong email value displayed when aborting an inline edition
* Unify jquery versions






### Community



We would love to have your feedback and input to help make SuiteCRM 8 great for everyone.




*Special thanks to everyone who reported security issues addressed in this release!*




Tanish Mahajan, navsec, Christoph Timm, nam\-no, Shahzaib Ali Khan, Alex Bernier

If you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues).




If you want to get involved and submit a fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit A PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Please [visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/releases/) to find the appropriate upgrade package.




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)

## 8\.4\.1




*Released 03/10/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.4.1)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-5351: Stored XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-5351)
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-5353: Improper Access Control](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-5353)
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-5350: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-5350)





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [303](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/303) \- Fix [\#214](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/214) \- Fix issue with my tasks dashlet causing display issues on the homepage
* PR: [346](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/346) \- Fix [\#230](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/230) \- Not able to access native auth with saml
* PR: [345](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/345) \- Fix [\#344](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/344) \- Fix admin metadata call not being cached
* PR: [9864](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9864) \- Fix [\#9807](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9807) \- Email import fix
* PR: [9806](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9806) \- Fix [\#9805](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9805) \- Use timezone offset for datetime only
* PR: [9726](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9726) \- Fix [\#9725](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9725) \- Date field value isn’t saved in a Workflow action related module
* PR: [10185](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10185) \- Fix [\#10184](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10184) \- Timezone not set on silent install
* PR: [10140](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10140) \- Fix [\#10139](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10139) \- HTML Text Field tinyMCE version
* PR: [10132](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10132) \- Fix [\#10131](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10131) \- Fix issue with file mode changes not being applied on cache rebuild
* PR: [10110](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10110) \- Fix [\#10109](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10109) \- Add displayParams.initial\_filter to Parent
* PR: [9996](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9996) \- Fix [\#8939](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8939) \- Fix Static call to non\-static method in AOW\_WorkFlow
* PR: [9999](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9999) \- Fix [\#9021](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9021) \- User Preferences Wrong Label
* PR: [10005](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10005) \- Fix [\#9574](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9574) \- Avoid calling method in a static way
* PR: [10058](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10058) \- Fix [\#5390](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5390) \- Redundant message when duplicating a survey
* PR: [10130](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10130) \- Fix [\#10129](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10129) \- Fix issue with step 2 \& 3 on the importer failing
* PR: [10092](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10092) \- Fix [\#9062](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9062) \- Studio layout changes not being reflected
* PR: [10008](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10008) \- Fix [\#10007](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10007) \- Text area cannot span two fields
* PR: [10016](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10016) \- Fix [\#5712](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5712) \- Alerts in the menu bar are not displayed with Night theme
* PR: [10102](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10102) \- Fix [\#5385](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5385) \- Fix Closed survey issues
* PR: [10063](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10063) \- Fix [\#2111](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2111) \- Hover over favorites item, shows module name, not label
* PR: [10079](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10079) \- Fix [\#3050](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3050) \- AOW: dropdown lists is not updating (calclulate field \& modified record action)
* PR: [9997](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9997) \- Fix [\#8359](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8359) \- Fix Contract renewal reminder title is hardcoded
* PR: [9994](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9994) \- Fix [\#9148](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9148) \- Fix missing sorting labels
* PR: [10020](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10020) \- Fix \#10020 \- Issue with missing label on Contact Module
* PR: [10195](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10195) \- Fix \#10195 \- dropdown keys are not the same type
* PR: [10060](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10060) \- Fix \#10060 \- User preferences detail\-view template issues
* PR: [10120](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10120) \- Fix \#10120 \- Inbound Email Issues
* PR: [9941](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9941) \- Fix \#9941 \- Remove sugar pro flavor

We will continue to enhance SuiteCRM 8 with new features and improvements, the latest of which can be found on our [Road Map](https://suitecrm.com/suitecrm-roadmap/).




In the meantime, if you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have a suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues). Before raising an issue please be sure to check the [Release Notes and list of Known Issues](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/releases/).




If you want to get involved or submit a Fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit An PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Check the following documentation page for more information on how to upgrade between SuiteCRM 8 versions [Upgrading documentation](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/admin/installation-guide/upgrading/)




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)




More information regarding our Security Process can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/community/raising-issues/#_security).





---






## 8\.4\.0




*Released 29/08/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.4.0)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### System Requirement Changes




The minimum php version has been updated to php 8\.1\. The supported versions are now php 8\.1 and 8\.2\.






To visit the SuiteCRM 8\.4\.x Compatibility Matrix please see [here.](../../compatibility-matrix/)





#### Backward Incompatible Changes



##### 1\. Default extension renamed to defaultExt




The 'extensions/default' package has been renamed to 'extensions/defaultExt'.






The upgrade process does not remove the old `extensions/default` package. Any changes on it should be manually moved to the `extensions/defaultExt`.




The `extensions/default` is going to be removed in a future version.





##### 2\. DisplayType logic moved to displayLogic



The `displayType` logic within the metadata `logic` entry has been deprecated. This will be removed in a future version.




There is a now a more flexible metadata entry that should be used, named `displayLogic`. See [Field Display Logic](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/field-logic/fe-extensions-display-logic/) guide for more information.






#### Upgrading




It is no longer required to stop on 8\.3\.1 before upgrading to the following versions.






The code that caused this issue has been reverted.
It is again possible to upgrade from 8\.2\.0 (or 8\.3\) directly to 8\.4\+,
For more information about upgrades please see the [Upgrade Documentation.](../../upgrading)





#### Documentation



* We have updated the Field Logic page. This is now split into different [pages.](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/)




	+ We have added a new page explaining operators with examples here also.
* We have added documentation about the [Process Api](../../../developer/extensions/backend/process-api).





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [299](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/299) \-
Fix [\#215](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/215) \- Cant Create records from custom modules
* PR: [286](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/286) \- Fix \#286 \- Field Layout
* PR: [285](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/285) \- Fix \#285 \- Readonly Field on Field Logic
* PR: [269](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/269) \- Fix \#296 \- Fix case update notes
* PR: [10116](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10116) \- Fix [\#10053](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10053) \- Issue when creating new tabs on Dashlets
* PR: [10106](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10106) \- Fix [\#10105](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10105) \- Fix 500 error when saving audited numeric field
* PR: [10108](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10108) \- Fix [\#10107](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10107) \- Function getRelatedId is unable to return NULL values





#### Enhancements



##### Nav Bar Redesign



The Nav Bar within Suite has went through some changes:




![Nav Bar](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Nav-Bar.png)




The `+` will now show you actions relating to the module you are on, as well as Quick Actions to create a record
in another module:




![Contact Actions](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Contacts-Action.png)





##### Floating Save



SuiteCRM now has a floating save meaning no matter where you are on a record you can save:




![Nav Bar](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Floating-Save-Example.png)





##### Developer improvements



* Add support for more operators in field logic. See [Logic Operators](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/operators/) guide
* New field display logic configuration. See [Field Display Logic](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/field-logic/fe-extensions-display-logic/) guide
* New record view panel display logic configuration. See [Panel Display Logic](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/panel-logic/fe-extensions-dynamic-panels/) guide
* New field logic for updating field with pre\-defined value. See [Update Field Value](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/field-logic/fe-extensions-update-value/) guide
* New field logic for calculating value in the backend. See [Update Field Value Based on a backend calculation](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/field-logic/fe-extensions-update-value-backend/) guide





##### Smarty Upgrade



Smarty, the templating engine used in SuiteCRM 7\.x, has been upgraded to v4 which brings some minor performance improvements
and better compatibility going forward.





##### PHP 8\.2 Support



This release brings a number of adjustments and updates in order to support PHP 8\.2\.




This includes:




* Removal of deprecated functions/ features.
* Update functions to PHP 8\.2 standard.
* Fixed Unit \& Acceptance Tests
* Executed Rector to clean up code.
* Fixed code to eliminate warnings from logs.







### Community



We would love to have your feedback and input to help make SuiteCRM 8 great for everyone.




*Special thanks to the following members for their contributions and participation in this release!*







[![ibanvaqe Avatar](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/ibanvaqe)](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/ibanvaqe)
[ibanvaqe](https://github.com/ibanvaqe)






If you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues).




If you want to get involved and submit a fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit A PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Please [visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/releases/) to find the appropriate upgrade package.




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)

# 8\.5 Releases





## 8\.5\.1




*Released 05/02/2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.5.1)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Updates in Scheduler



From this release forward there is a now an out of the box ElasticSearch Scheduler Job. The purpose of this job is to run an ElasticSearch Index.
This will not be automatically added on upgrade due to backwards compatibility, however can be enabled via Admin page → Repair →
Repair Schedulers.





#### Documentation



* We have added a new page explaining action display logic see [here.](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/logic/action-logic/fe-extensions-display-action-logic)

## 8\.5\.0




*Released 13/12/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.5.0)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### System Requirement Changes




Angular version has been updated to v16\. For development purposes you will need to update your dependencies. Please see the SuiteCRM 8\.5\.x Compatibility Matrix [here.](../../compatibility-matrix/)







#### Backward Incompatible Changes



##### Frontend Extension Updates



With the upgrade to angular v16 the version of the `@angular-architects/module-federation` lib has also been updated.




Previously built extensions will need to be updated. Please read the [Frontend extension \- Migrate to SuiteCRM 8\.5\+](../../../developer/extensions/frontend/migration/migration-8.5/) guide for information on how to upgrade.






#### Enhancements



##### Cache Upgrade



We have added Symfony caching to backend metadata calls. On average this reduces the app metadata graphql calls from 429ms to 323ms.




We have applied several actions that reset the cache which include:




* Saving in User Profile
* Applying Menu Configuration changes
* Saving Password Management changes
* etc…​




If there is any reason this might not be working, cache can also be reset by running a `Repair and Rebuild` from within
the `Admin`→\`Repair\` menu.





##### Quick Filters



Quick Filters have now been added to SuiteCRM 8!




Quick Filters are new option on list view saved filters. They allow easy access to filters and easy switching between frequently used filters (as depicted on the following gif).




To learn more about see the [Quick Filters documentation](../../../features/filters/quick-filters/quick-filters)




![Quick Filters Demo](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/quick-filter-demo-docs.gif)





##### Mobile Adjustments



We have made some minor adjustments to the mobile view, where Insights are now disabled by default.




![Mobile Adjustments](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/mobile-adjustments.png)




When Insights are selected it will now show instead of the listview.




![Mobile Insights](/images/en/8.x/admin/release/Mobile-Insights.png)




To return to listview, you can disable insights.







### Community



We would love to have your feedback and input to help make SuiteCRM 8 great for everyone.




If you have found an issue you think we should know about, or have suggestion/feedback, please [Submit An Issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues).




If you want to get involved and submit a fix, fork the repo and when ready please [Submit A PR](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pulls) \- More detail for developers can be found [here](https://docs.suitecrm.com/8.x/developer/installation-guide/).




Please [visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/releases/) to find the appropriate upgrade package.




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)

# 8\.6 Releases





## 8\.6\.2




*Released 14 August 2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.6.2)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Configuration Changes



* There is a new configuration added to `config.php` called `login_language`. Setting this to `true` will show the language selector on login.
* There is a new language selector in the User profile and User Wizard! Allowing any user to set their language via profile and setup.




	+ This can be found within the `Advanced` tab.
	+ Something to note: Logging in with a different language will set your Preference to that language.





#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-45392: Wrong deletion permission checks on API delete call](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45392) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-8qfx-h7pm-2587) \| Reporter: gunnicom





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [530](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/530) \- Fix \#530 \- Fix long values on topwidget
* PR: [529](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/529) \- Fix \#529 \- survey module textarea overflow

* PR: [523](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/523) \- Fix \#523 \- unlink issue on subpanel activities or history

* PR: [515](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/515) \- Fix [\#467](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/467) \- Textblock Field Does Not Render on Front End
* PR: [514](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/514) \- Fix [\#471](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/471) \- accented characters not displayed correctly
* PR: [492](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/492) \- Fix [\#491](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/491) \- Diagnostic Tool broken in latest version
* PR: [482](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/482) \- Fix [\#481](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/481) \- Editing related quote from opportunity subpanel gives you are not authorized
* PR: [462](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/pull/462) \- Fix \#462 \- Load More keeping index

* PR: [10468](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10468) \- Fix [\#6376](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/6376) \- Problem with date start and finish in project task filters
* PR: [10461](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10461) \- Fix [\#10268](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10268) \- Access token wil not refresh for Oauth2 password clients
* PR: [10444](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10444) \- Fix [\#10443](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10443) \- Incorrect lengths in emails\_text vardefs
* PR: [10442](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10442) \- Fix [\#10437](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10437) \- Calendar \- 'Today' left\-hand side bar option loads the week
* PR: [10434](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10434) \- Fix [\#10433](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10433) \- Email Address ID being double quoted
* PR: [10429](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10429) \- Fix [\#5653](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5653) \- VAT Display in PDF Templates wrong when Currency Significant Digits set to 0
* PR: [10406](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10406) \- Fix [\#10404](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10404) \- Compare parentenum\_value more precisely
* PR: [10399](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10399) \- Fix [\#2175](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2175) \- No gif and shifted text after saving task in gants view
* PR: [10394](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10394) \- Fix [\#2828](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2828) \- Not translatable messages in Dashlet parameters
* PR: [10390](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10390) \- Fix \#10390 \- URL is not clickable
* PR: [10380](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10380) \- Fix [\#7150](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/7150) \- Show subpanels correctly
* PR: [10373](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10373) \- Fix [\#10372](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10372) \- Product import fails with fatal error
* PR: [10362](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10362) \- Fix [\#9078](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9078) \- Favorites adds record twice to the sidebar and to the db
* PR: [10341](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10341) \- Fix [\#10339](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10339) \- Inconsistent application of trim function on name \& varchar fields
* PR: [10336](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10336) \- Fix [\#10335](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10335) \- Incorrect codification in the names of events displayed in the Calendar
* PR: [10320](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10320) \- Fix [\#10319](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10319) \- Json API SQL error when filtering by custom fields
* PR: [10470](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10470) \- Fix [\#9829](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9829) \- Fatal error during upgrade to 7\.12\.8
* PR: [10471](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10471) \- Fix [\#10467](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10467) \- Date range not working
* PR: [10441](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10441) \- Fix \#10441 \- VAT Values display incorrectly on Quotes→Service Line Items, if Significant Figures \= 0
* PR: [10473](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10473) \- Fix [\#9855](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9855) \- Using a "Personal"\-type Oauth Connection causes issues with "Group"\-type Inbound Accounts
* Truncate saved filter names
* Fix Quick Filter Styling
* Show titleKey on Filter dropdown
* Improve Administration navigation for mobile
* Improve date field styling
* Improve dropdown styling
* Improve recently viewed for mobile
* Fix delete of legacy record on recently viewed




##### Known Issues



* After changing "User Language" via your user profile:




	+ If an Admin updates another user’s "User Language" value, and that user then logs in with different language chosen at Login, this can cause issues with showing the correct Language labels
	+ If a user updates their "User Language" value on their Profile, Admin users may not see the correct language selected on that User’s Profile.
	+ If a user updates their "User Language" value on their Profile, some User Profile Action labels are not updating
	+ Sometimes, when changing Language, the Navbar Menu labels are not updating correctly
* The above issues should mostly be resolved with a hard refresh or a Repair and Rebuild
* If no timezone value is set on CLI install, or user bean Save() function is called, UTC is set as preference







### Community



We would love to have your feedback and input to help make SuiteCRM 8 great for everyone.

## 8\.6\.1




*Released 10 June 2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/releases/tag/v8.6.1)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Upgrade Guide](../../upgrading)
* [SuiteCRM 8 Migration from SuiteCRM 7](../../legacy-migration/8.2.0-legacy-migration/)





### Release Notes



#### Documentation



* We have updated our documentation regarding raising security issues, see more on that [here.](../../../../community/security-policy)
* We have updated recent SuiteCRM Version Release Notes with the Install and Upgrade Guide to both 7 and 8 as well as the Migration Guide for SuiteCRM 8\.





#### Security




Important: This release includes critical security fixes, we strongly recommend users of older versions to update as soon as possible






* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36416: Excessive log data DOS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36416) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-jrpp-22g3-2j77) \| Reporter: Elysee Franchuk
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36415: Improper Access Control Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36415) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-c82f-58jv-jfrh) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36414: SSRF Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36414) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-wg74-772c-8gr7) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36413: XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36413) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-ph2c-hvvf-r273) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36412: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36412) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-xjx2-38hv-5hh8) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36411: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36411) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-9rvr-mcrf-p4p7) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius

* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36407: Improper Access Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36407) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-6p2f-wwx9-952r) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius

* PR: [10375](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10375) \- Fix \#10375 \- Upgradewizard double commit
* PR: [10402](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10402) \- Fix [\#10401](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10401), [\#10376](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10376) \- PDF rendering issues
* PR: [10409](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10409) \- Fix \#10409 \- skip to last page if disable\_count\_query\=true
* PR: [10323](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10323) \- Fix [\#10172](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10172) \- Emails don’t show subject MIME headers
* PR: [10389](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10389) \- Fix [\#1872](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1872) \- Admin \- Install Module \- "Back to Module Loader" shows page with header only
* PR: [10424](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10424) \- Fix [\#9213](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9213) \- $discount\_amount corrupted
* PR: [10426](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10426) \- Feature \#10426 \- new issue menu templates
* Fix Default value not setting correctly on some fields.
* Fix z\-index on the useful bar.
