## 7\.12\.1




*Released 19/11/2021*




### Assets



* [**Source code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.12.1.zip)
* [**Source code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.12.1.tar.gz)




#### Security



* CVE: Pending \- Fixed file check bypass
* CVE: Pending \- Local File Inclusion



#### Enhancements



* PR: [9369](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9369) \- Prevent Email Reminders for Disabled User





#### Bug Fixes



* Fix [8432](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8432) \- Remove index limit from mssql index names upon create and repair.
* PR: [9334](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9334) \- Implement PDF extension
* PR: [9347](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9347) \- Fix rebuild scss Robo command
* PR: [9357](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9357) \- Use wildcard rather than the defunct "\_all" field
* PR: [9351](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9351) \- Fix [9119](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9119) \- Rebuild theme cache after custom property changed in Studio
* PR: [9368](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9368) \- Fix [9217](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9217) \- Revert "Fix Users index incompatible with MSSQL".
* PR: [9360](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9360) \- Fix [9358](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9358) \- Meeting invite notification emails are not sending to all invitees.
* PR: [9361](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9361) \- Fix [9192](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9192): Fix duplication of folders\_rel table entries.
* PR: [9246](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9246) \- Fix [6994](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/6994): Update pollMonitoredInboxesAOP to double check that SugarFolder has been retrieved correctly.
* PR: [9367](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9367) \- Update PDF template warning

## 7\.12




*Released 28/10/2021*




### Update 04/11/2021



Upgrade Packages have been revised to address an issue [\#9340](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9340) where upgrades could only be performed on php 7\.3\.x. The revised upgrade packages have been posted to the release section on the main website [here](https://suitecrm.com/upgrade-suitecrm/).





### Assets



* [**Source code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.12.0.zip)
* [**Source code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.12.0.tar.gz)




#### Enhancements



* PR: [9244](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9244) \- PDF Engine Selection




	+ MPDF License has be found to no longer be compliant with AGPL3 and due to this the MPDF will not be included in new installs.
	MPDF will not be removed on upgrade, but the system will default to a new engine, with an option to revert back to the MDPF if required.
* PR: [9185](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9185) \- Noon Theme
* PR: [9298](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9298) \- Implement TCPDFEngine
* PR: [9208](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9208) \- Implement standard PDF Engines
* PR: [9187](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9187) \- Composer 2\.0
* PR: [9291](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9291) \- Allow configuring the Calendar name for the Google Sync via config
* PR: [9171](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9171) \- Upgrade ElasticSearch to 7\.x




	+ This is the new minimum ElasticSearch version that is required for update.
* PR: [9170](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9170) \- PHPUnit/Codeception Upgrade
* PR: [9159](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9159) \- Implement standard SearchEngines
* PR: [9172](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9172) \- Malicious File Scanning
* PR: [9095](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9095) \- Consolidate global search settings (AOD, Basic)





#### Other Notable Changes



* PR: [9094](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9094) \- AOD (Lucene) has been Deprecated to be removed in SuiteCRM 8\.0
* PR: [9321](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9321) \- Fix TCPDF Scale
* PR: [9333](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9333) \- Deprecate TCPDF
* PR: [9335](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9335) \- Fix PDF Engine Comparability issues
* PR: [9186](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9186) \- Fix missing default config values
* PR: [9188](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9188) \- Fix PDF\_Lib constructors
* PR: [9324](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9324) \- Fix search result hits
* PR: [9318](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9318) \- Fix TCPDF Name
* PR: [9310](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9310) \- Fix SearchFormView visible options
* PR: [9309](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9309) \- Update workflow acceptance test
* PR: [9296](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9296) \- Fix CleanCSVTest return types
* PR: [9306](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9306) \- Fix filepath for mPDF class
* PR: [9294](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9294) \- Fix/noon styling issues
* PR: [9083](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9083) \- Update minimum required PHP to v7\.3\.0
* All default config value now set on install
* utf8mb4 charset and utf8mb4\_general\_ci collation now the default on MySQL Databases on new installs






### Community



Please [visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the appropriate upgrade package.




To report any security issues please follow our Security Process and send them directly to us via email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)

	+ MPDF License has be found to no longer be compliant with AGPL3 and due to this the MPDF will not be included in new installs.
	MPDF will not be removed on upgrade, but the system will default to a new engine, with an option to revert back to the MDPF if required.
* PR: [9185](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9185) \- Noon Theme
* PR: [9298](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9298) \- Implement TCPDFEngine
* PR: [9208](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9208) \- Implement standard PDF Engines

* PR: [9171](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9171) \- Upgrade ElasticSearch to 7\.x




	+ This is the new minimum ElasticSearch version that is required for update.
* PR: [9170](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9170) \- PHPUnit/Codeception Upgrade
* PR: [9159](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9159) \- Implement standard SearchEngines

#### Other Notable Changes

# 7\.13\.x Releases





## 7\.13\.4




*Released 11/07/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.13.4)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10045](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10045) \- Codeception testing compatibility changes
* PR: [10097](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10097) \- Fix AOP Config not saving
* PR: [10055](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10055) \- Fix [\#9548](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9548) \- Wrong decimal precision returned in a Modify Record workflow action
* PR: [9938](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9938) \- Fix [\#9937](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9937) \- Resolve high memory usage when performing bulk relationship changes
* PR: [10072](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10072) \- Fix [\#10034](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10034) \- Email Listview doesn’t render, so no Emails are visible
* PR: [8683](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/8683) \- Fix [\#8682](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8682) \- Workflow fails with relationship condition
* PR: [10067](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10067) \- Fix [\#10047](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10047) \- Tasks due date not saving
* PR: [10098](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10098) \- Fix [\#10091](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10091) \- login parameter failing
* PR: [10071](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10071) \- Fix [\#10035](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10035) \- Monitered Folders are not selectable for Basic Auth Accounts
* PR: [10051](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10051) \- Add better description of what is being removed during module installation for ACLs
* PR: [10050](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10050) \- Add missing language definitions for the module loader
* PR: [\#9816](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9816) \- Item element getting called incorrectly
* PR: [10024](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10024) \- Fix [\#9601](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9601) \- Fix bug where report conditions parenthesis pairs would not save correctly
* PR: [10044](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10044) \- Fix [10029](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10029) \- Issues changing dashlets name
* PR: [9983](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9983) \- Fix [\#9516](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9516) \- getRelatedId returns null instead of a string
* PR: [9657](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9657) \- Fix [9654](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9654) \- different date formats being compared for change log
* PR: [10036](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10036) \- Fix [\#10033](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10033) \- PHP Fatal error Uncaught TypeError PHP8

## 7\.13\.3




*Released 24/04/2023*

* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [9965](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9965) \- Fix \#9965 \- Upgrade league/oauth2\-server to latest version
* PR: [9974](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9974) \- Fix \#9974 \- Email OAuth Saving with no type
* PR: [9542](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9542) \- Fix \#9542 \- PHP8 null values
* PR: [9812](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9812) \- Fix \#9812 \- Decimal number calculations
* PR: [9817](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9817) \- Fix \#9817 \- A typo in Campaign Trackers
* PR: [9828](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9828) \- Fix \#9828 \- $mod\_strings was not initiated
* PR: [9849](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9849) \- Fix \#9849 \- allowed\_preview is defined twice
* PR: [9642](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9642) \- Fix [\#9602](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9602) \- ProspectLists save function has a duplication issue
* PR: [9559](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9559) \- Fix [\#7759](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/7759), [\#8273](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8273) \- Double Compose button in subpanels
* PR: [10010](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10010) \- Fix [\#10009](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10009) \- Cannot configure Module Menu Filters on PHP8\+
* PR: [9325](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9325) \- Fix [\#9153](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9153) \- Adding dynamicenum case option for export
* PR: [9329](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9329) \- Fix [\#8897](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8897) \- Adding missing relationship for SurveyResponses module
* PR: [9471](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9471) \- Fix [\#9470](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9470) \- Set fdow in Calendar popup date selector for range search and MassUpdate
* PR: [9520](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9520) \- Fix [\#9326](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9326) \- Adding decimal and float case option for export
* PR: [9528](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9528) \- Fix [\#9476](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9476) \- Mass assign security groups only assigns selected on current page
* PR: [9622](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9622) \- Fix [\#9621](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9621) \- Workflows Calculate Field Actions don’t translate dynamicenum fields
* PR: [9765](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9765) \- Fix [\#9764](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9764) \- Add extra To addresses to CC field
* PR: [9777](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9777) \- Fix [\#9768](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9768) \- Do not convert link URLs in TinyMCE
* PR: [9784](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9784) \- Fix [\#9783](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9783) \- Compose view quick search for email templates
* PR: [9787](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9787) \- Fix [\#9780](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9780) \- New User Group Popup. Popup does not show after creating a user
* PR: [9876](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9876) \- Fix [\#9875](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9875) \- SugarFeed shows 0 seconds ago and negative interval for certain datetime formats
* PR: [9903](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9903) \- Fix [\#9902](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9902) \- Workflow \- Some Date calculations fail with certain formats

## 7\.13\.2




*Released 02/03/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.13.2)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: Pending \- RCE Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Stored XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- Stored XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: Pending \- SSRF Vulnerability





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [9666](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9666) \- Fix [\#9665](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9665) \- Set unique id for "Reset module" button in studio
* PR: [9742](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9742) \- Fix Closing count bracket before relational operator PHP 8\.0 count throwing TypeError
* PR: [9751](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9751) \- Fix [\#9750](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9750) \- Receive related parameters of type dynamicenum in workflow formulas
* PR: [9796](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9796) \- Fix [\#4646](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4646) \- Hard coded messages in Surveys module
* PR: [9836](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9836) \- Fix [\#9835](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9835) \- Case Updates save bug
* PR: [9872](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9872) \- Fix [\#9871](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9871) \- Javascript message error when bulk updating all user records
* PR: [9874](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9874) \- Fix [\#9873](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9873) \- Plesk php.ini disable\_functions \= opcache\_get\_status
* PR: [9882](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9882) \- Fix OPCache install module copy action
* PR: [9884](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9884) \- Fix [\#9883](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9883) \- Security Groups do not work with modules whose name exceeds 36 characters.
* PR: [9910](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9910) \- Fix [\#9909](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9909) \- Default empty item when creating a new Dropdown field
* PR: [9914](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9914) \- Close \#9914 \- Update dashboard.scss for dashlet options overflow
* PR: [9955](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9955) \- Fix [\#9926](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9926) \- Add missing check on product image upload
* PR: [9901](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9901) \- Fix [\#9900](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9900) \- Conditions doesn’t recognize some of the characters set
* PR: [9954](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9954) \- Fix Campaign Parenthesis
* PR: [9813](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9813) \- Fix [\#9344](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9344) \- Error in Browsers console after adding tabs to Quickcreate: function selectTabOnError

## 7\.13\.0




*Released 20/12/2022*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.13.0)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)




#### Enhancements



* PR: [9839](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9839) \- Close \#9839 \- Add OAuth connection to Inbound emails
* PR: [9848](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9848) \- Close \#9848 \- Add OAuth external providers module
* PR: [9846](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9846) \- Close \#9846 \- Add ACL Access Logic Hook





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [9802](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9802) \- Close \#9802 \- Diagnostic Checkbox
* PR: [9718](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9718) \- Fix [\#9717](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9717) \- Security Suite Group Selector doesn’t appear when duplicating records
* PR: [9648](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9648) \- Fix [\#9646](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9646) \- Display TinyMCE in Campaigns Form Wizard
* PR: [9643](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9643) \- Fix [\#9574](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9574) \- Update method to static for module renaming
* PR: [9500](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9500) \- Fix [9499](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9499) \- Add View Survey Responses Menu item
* PR: [9638](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9638) \- Close \#9683 \- Elasticsearch indexing and searching using accented characters
* PR: [9474](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9474) \- Fix [\#9473](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9473) \- Missing item "Survey" in campainglog\_activity\_type\_dom
* PR: [9844](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9844) \- Close \#9844 \- ElasticSearch Indexing batch error handling
* PR: [9770](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9770) \- Fix [\#9568](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9568) \- Ignore int len when comparing vardefs in newer MySQL versions
* PR: [9786](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9786) \- Close \#9786 \- Clear caches used by Inline Edition
* PR: [9671](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9671) \- Fix [\#9670](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9670) \- Disabling the user profile option about notification of assignments does not work




In this release there has been an incredible update to Emails including the following;






### Update External OAuth Connection Module



* Add `ExternalOAuthConnection` module to allow getting access through OAuth from external providers.
* Allow setting up Security groups for `ExternalOuthConnections` Emails.
* Configure Microsoft connection provider using a configuration similar to the following:




![OAuth Microsoft Connection](/images/en/admin/release/OAuthMicrosoftConnection.png)





### Updates to Inbound Emails Module



* Update Inbound Email Views are now identical to other modules.
* Allow the creation of Personal, Group and Bounce mail accounts through create/edit views.
* Allow Security Groups to be set for Inbound Emails.
* Allow the select between `basic` and `oauth connection` on Inbound Email create/edit views.
* Allow selecting an external oauth connection as the connection to use for authenticating in Inbound Emails.




![Inbound OAuth Configuration](/images/en/admin/release/InboundOAuthConfiguration.png)




* Remove Inbound Email configuration from profile view.





### Update Outbound Emails Module



* Allow creating personal Outbound email accounts through Outbound Email module views.
* Allow Security Groups to be set for Outbound Emails.
* Remove Outbond Email configuration from profile view.





### Update IMAP connection library \| Allow connecting with xoauth



* Add imap2 lib to handle in order to support xoauth login in imap.
* Add Imap2Handler to be used to connect to IMAP for Oauth connections.




#### Documentation



* Configure Security Groups for Inbound Email [here](../../administration-panel/emails/inboundemail-securitygroups).
* Setup a Microsoft OAuth Provider [here](../../administration-panel/emails/microsoft-oauth-provider-howto).
* Configure Inbound Email with OAuth [here](../../administration-panel/emails/inboundemail-oauth-howto).
* External OAuth Provider Overview [here](../../administration-panel/emails/oauth-provider-overview).






### Known Issues



* Issue: [\#9852](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9852) \- New "Move to trash" toggle causing Case Updates to not import
* Issue: [\#9853](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9853) \- Case Macro not populated on Upgrade
* Issue: [\#9855](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9855) \- When a personal oauth connection is used for a group inbound email, the emails break
* Issue: [\#9856](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9856) \- Email listview filtering shows blank result if a criteria with multiple words and spaces is added
* Issue: [\#9857](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9857) \- Email listview filtering shows blank result for IMAP keywords criteria
* Issue: [\#9854](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9854) \- Test settings issue after switching between OAuth and Basic Auth
* Issue: [\#9858](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9858) \- Group Inbound Emails distribution\_method field is reset when Editing the record again
* Issue: [\#9867](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9867) \- Inbound Email’s "SSL" checkbox does not retain Checked status after Upgrade

## 7\.14\.8




*Released 6 November 2025*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/suitecrm/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.8)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-64488: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64488) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-5v53-v44q-ww2c) \| Reporter: allannjuguna
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-64489: Privilege Escalation Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64489) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-j6jg-9jj3-q2ph) \| Reporter: prakhar0x01
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-64490: Improper Access Control](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64490) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-jh8v-wqgj-hhc2) \| Reporter: prakhar0x01
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-64491: XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64491) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-prfm-6667-x3mv) \| Reporter: Nicolas Decayeux (Patrowl)





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10709](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10709) \- Fix [\#10708](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10708) \- Converting Quote to Invoice ignores field defaults
* PR: [10713](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10713) \- Fix \#10713 \- Fix edit link (pencil) in Global Search
* PR: [10714](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10714) \- Fix \#10714 \- Fix multienum fields in dashlet filters
* PR: [10716](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10716) \- Fix \#10716 \- Fix Inline Edit for decimal fields
* PR: [10725](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10725) \- Fix \#10725 \- Set Email Warning Notification to false
* PR: [10571](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10571) \- Fix [\#10570](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10570) \- Email Signature Compose View Issues
* PR: [10727](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10727) \- Fix [\#10726](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10726) \- Search Pagination and Module Filter
* PR: [10733](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10733) \- Fix [\#10732](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10732) \- Can’t list view inbound email inboxes after soft\-deleting a user with an active email inbox
* PR: [10736](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10736) \- Fix \#10736 \- Fix Workflow modify record date issue
* PR: [10723](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10723) \- Fix [\#10722](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10722) \- Set date\_entered after save update
* PR: [10734](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10734) \- Fix [\#10724](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10724) \- Email Subject not importing correctly

## 7\.14\.7




*Released 06 August 2025*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/suitecrm/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.7)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Outbound Email Changes



* You are now able to configure an Outbound Email Account with OAuth. To see more information on setup please see [here.](../../administration-panel/emails/inboundemail-oauth-howto)





#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-54785: RCE Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54785) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-53cp-mpfw-qj67) \| Reporter: dzentota
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-54786: Improper Access Control Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54786) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM-Core/security/advisories/GHSA-rf2v-4mv3-qcgm) \| Reporter: sec31uk
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-54787: Improper Access Control Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54787) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-8r72-224q-g9fv) \| Reporter: paul1278
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-54788: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54788) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-v3m9-8wg7-c72x) \| Reporter: Parnuski
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-54783: XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54783) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-vqrj-gp9m-8c6r) \| Reporter: Sergio Marín Martínez
* CVE: [CVE\-2025\-54784: XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54784) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-vg8q-xcq5-mh3p) \| Reporter: paul1278





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10599](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10599) \- Fix Importing Error Styling
* PR: [10565](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10565) \- Fix [\#10564](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10564) \- Thank you message in Surveys only in English
* PR: [10549](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10549) \- Fix variable name typo in getEmailInfo
* PR: [10502](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10502) \- Remove duplicate line
* PR: [10480](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10480) \- Fix [\#10479](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10479) \- Call LoggerManager’s warn() method instead of warning()
* PR: [10400](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10400) \- Correctly find the id of related objects in search results
* PR: [9810](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/9810) \- Fix [\#9809](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/9809) \- Incorrect parsing of 0 values in PDF templates
* PR: [10662](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10662) \- Fix [\#10661](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10661) \- Fix preference on setting role
* PR: [10660](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10660) \- Fix Email Template not saving in plain text
* PR: [10659](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10659) \- Fix [\#10637](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10637) \- Local users gets Profile wizard on each login
* PR: [10309](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10309) \- Fix [\#10264](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10264) \- Error Assigned\_user\_name SearchView.tpl ({php} tag now crashes Smarty 4\)
* PR: [10476](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10476) \- Fix [\#10475](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10475) \- Rename the History subpanel by changing the label
* PR: [10649](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10649) \- Fix [\#8280](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/8280) \- Fix Autocomplete search in line items
* PR: [10612](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10612) \- Fix [\#10612](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10611) \- Subpanels don’t show related records links when view permission is set to "group"
* PR: [10607](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10607) \- Fix [\#10606](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10606) \- Recently viewed items tooltip shows module name instead of full record name
* PR: [10625](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10625) \- Fix [\#10624](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10624) \- Prevent Multiple Submissions on Survey Forms
* PR: [10538](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10538) \- Fix [\#10243](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10243) \- studio not saving field properties correctly
* PR: [10285](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10285) \- Fix non\-countable error when importing CSV
* PR: [10617](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10617) \- Fix [\#10616](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10616) \- Default values of DateTime always in English and value “first day of next month” gives an error
* PR: [10648](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10648) \- Fix [\#8632](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/8632) \- API V8 /meta/fields/{moduleName} endpoint output without field labels
* PR: [10623](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10623) \- Allow End Users to use the PATCH method for the V8 API
* PR: [10601](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10601) \- Fix [\#10113](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10113) \- Contracts / List Items table for services has bogus width
* PR: [10544](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10544) \- Fix [\#10543](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10543) \- Remove Security Groups button on subpanelsbased on EditView
* PR: [10675](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10675) \- Fix [\#10147](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10147), [\#10369](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10396) \- Smarty unregistered function deprecated notice
* PR: [10378](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10378) \- Fix [10532](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10532), [10377](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10377) \- Fix issues with global search not displaying values correctly
* PR: [10700](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10700) \- Fix [\#10345](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10345) \- Azure OAuth Redirect Uri Entrypoint




Other Fixes:




* Fix notice messages preventing importing.
* Fix Importer progress bar using incorrect values.

## 7\.14\.6




*Released 05 November 2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.6)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-50335: XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-50335) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-8rw6-g96j-3w7m) \| Reporter: shellkraft
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-49773: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-49773) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-5hr4-r43c-6qf7) \| Reporter: dzentota
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-50332: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-50332) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-53xh-mjmq-j35p) \| Reporter: amame04
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-50333: RCE Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-50333) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-qrv6-3q86-qv89) \| Reporter: dzentota
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-49772: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-49772) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-4xj8-hr85-hm3m) \| Reporter: LongHair00
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-49774: RCE Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-49774) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-9v56-vhp4-x227) \| Reporter: dzentota





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10525](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10525) \- Fix [\#5287](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5287) \- Change secret field is too short
* PR: [10520](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10520) \- Fix \#10520 \- Discount Calculation incorrect when changing Currency
* PR: [10451](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10451) \- Fix [\#10450](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10450) \- Add check for empty value before searching array
* PR: [10523](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10523) \- Fix [\#10503](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10503) \- Item label in dropdown list is not displayed if it contains '\<' character
* PR: [10101](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10101) \- Fix [\#10099](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10099) \- Workflow action create record on CRON set incorrect date field values from related entity
* PR: [10517](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10517) \- Fix [\#507](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/507) \- Calculated Fields \- related field won’t show up as parameter
* PR: [10225](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10225) \- Fix [\#9036](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9036) \- change log level according it message
* PR: [10288](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10288) \- Fix [\#9737](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9737) \- issue with campaigns displaying a blank email template
* PR: [10516](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10516) \- Fix [\#10445](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10445) \- Calendar: Calls still show even using Settings: 'Show Calls' \= NO
* PR: [10489](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10489) \- Fix [\#10488](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10488) \- Expand the number of filters in message queue views
* PR: [10455](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10455) \- Add scrollbars for Toolbox and Layout \| Studio
* PR: [10495](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10495) \- Fix [\#9261](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9261) \- Use decimal symbol configured in system and user
* PR: [10518](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10518) \- Fix [\#8332](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8332) \- Recipient Type \[Language]
* PR: [10557](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10557) \- Fix [\#10421](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10421) \- Studio \| Layout Editor CSS broken

## 7\.14\.5




*Released 14 August 2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.5)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Configuration Changes



* There is a new configuration added to `config.php` called `login_language`. Setting this to `true` will show the language selector on login.
* There is a new language selector in the User profile and User Wizard! Allowing any user to set their language via profile and setup.




	+ This can be found within the `Advanced` tab.
	+ Something to note: Logging in with a different language will set your Preference to that language.





#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-45392: Wrong deletion permission checks on API delete call](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45392) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-8qfx-h7pm-2587) \| Reporter: gunnicom





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10469](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10469) \- Fix [\#9177](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9177) \- Cant use edit inline in UserType field
* PR: [10468](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10468) \- Fix [\#6376](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/6376) \- Problem with date start and finish in project task filters
* PR: [10461](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10461) \- Fix [\#10268](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10268) \- Access token wil not refresh for Oauth2 password clients
* PR: [10444](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10444) \- Fix [\#10443](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10443) \- Incorrect lengths in emails\_text vardefs
* PR: [10442](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10442) \- Fix [\#10437](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10437) \- Calendar \- 'Today' left\-hand side bar option loads the week
* PR: [10434](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10434) \- Fix [\#10433](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10433) \- Email Address ID being double quoted
* PR: [10429](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10429) \- Fix [\#5653](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5653) \- VAT Display in PDF Templates wrong when Currency Significant Digits set to 0
* PR: [10406](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10406) \- Fix [\#10404](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10404) \- Compare parentenum\_value more precisely
* PR: [10399](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10399) \- Fix [\#2175](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2175) \- No gif and shifted text after saving task in gants view
* PR: [10394](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10394) \- Fix [\#2828](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2828) \- Not translatable messages in Dashlet parameters
* PR: [10390](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10390) \- Fix \#10390 \- URL is not clickable
* PR: [10380](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10380) \- Fix [\#7150](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/7150) \- Show subpanels correctly
* PR: [10373](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10373) \- Fix [\#10372](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10372) \- Product import fails with fatal error
* PR: [10362](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10362) \- Fix [\#9078](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9078) \- Favorites adds record twice to the sidebar and to the db
* PR: [10341](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10341) \- Fix [\#10339](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10339) \- Inconsistent application of trim function on name \& varchar fields
* PR: [10336](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10336) \- Fix [\#10335](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10335) \- Incorrect codification in the names of events displayed in the Calendar
* PR: [10320](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10320) \- Fix [\#10319](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10319) \- Json API SQL error when filtering by custom fields
* PR: [10470](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10470) \- Fix [\#9829](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9829) \- Fatal error during upgrade to 7\.12\.8
* PR: [10471](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10471) \- Fix [\#10467](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10467) \- Date range not working
* PR: [10441](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10441) \- Fix \#10441 \- VAT Values display incorrectly on Quotes→Service Line Items, if Significant Figures \= 0
* PR: [10473](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10473) \- Fix [\#9855](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9855) \- Using a "Personal"\-type Oauth Connection causes issues with "Group"\-type Inbound Accounts

## 7\.14\.4




*Released 10 June 2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.4)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Documentation



* We have updated our documentation regarding raising security issues, see more on that [here.](../../../community/security-policy)
* We have updated recent SuiteCRM Version Release Notes with the Install and Upgrade Guide to both 7 and 8 as well as the Migration Guide for SuiteCRM 8\.





#### Security




Important: This release includes critical security fixes, we strongly recommend users of older versions to update as soon as possible






* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36416: Excessive log data DOS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36416) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-jrpp-22g3-2j77) \| Reporter: Elysee Franchuk
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36415: Improper Access Control Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36415) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-c82f-58jv-jfrh) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36414: SSRF Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36414) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-wg74-772c-8gr7) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36413: XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36413) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-ph2c-hvvf-r273) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36412: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36412) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-xjx2-38hv-5hh8) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36411: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36411) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-9rvr-mcrf-p4p7) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36410: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36410) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-7jj8-m2wj-m6xq) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36409: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36409) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-pxq4-vw23-v73f) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36408: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36408) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-2g8f-gjrr-x5cg) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36407: Improper Access Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36407) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-6p2f-wwx9-952r) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36406: Open Redirect Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36406) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-hcw8-p37h-8hrv) \| Reporter: Anael MURAT (Fidens) \- Sicarius
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36418: RCE Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36418) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-mfj5-37v4-vh5w) \| Reporter: Andrius Oželis
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6537: SSRF Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6537) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-2674-4gq4-j4f4) \| Reporter: Carlos Bello
* CVE: [CVE\-2024\-36419: Host Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-36419) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/security/advisories/GHSA-3323-hjq3-c6vc) \| Reporter: Tanish Mahajan





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10411](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10411) \- Fix [\#10410](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10410) \- Check report has been loaded before setting user params
* PR: [9896](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9896) \- Fix [\#9895](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9895) \- Workflow \- Copying Formatted values of a multienum to another field
* PR: [9988](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9988) \- Fix [\#9985](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9985) \- Date end not stored correctly in Calls
* PR: [10186](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10186) \- Fix [\#10182](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10182) \- Graphic Issue search view after 7\.14 upgrade
* PR: [9972](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9972) \- Fix [\#9971](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9971) \- Workflow \- Add filters to quick and advanced search view in AOW Processed module
* PR: [10322](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10322) \- Fix [\#10321](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10321) \- Creation of Project with Template Causes 500 Error
* PR: [10328](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10328) \- Fix [\#10327](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10327) \- Survey Responses doesn’t get assigned\_user after sending Survey
* PR: [10375](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10375) \- Fix \#10375 \- Upgradewizard double commit
* PR: [10402](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10402) \- Fix [\#10401](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10401), [\#10376](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10376) \- PDF rendering issues
* PR: [10409](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10409) \- Fix \#10409 \- skip to last page if disable\_count\_query\=true
* PR: [10323](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10323) \- Fix [\#10172](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10172) \- Emails don’t show subject MIME headers
* PR: [10389](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10389) \- Fix [\#1872](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1872) \- Admin \- Install Module \- "Back to Module Loader" shows page with header only
* PR: [10424](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10424) \- Fix [\#9213](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9213) \- $discount\_amount corrupted
* PR: [10426](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10426) \- Feature \#10426 \- new issue menu templates

## 7\.14\.3




*Released 05 February 2024*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.3)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Updates in Scheduler



From this release forward there is a now an out of the box ElasticSearch Scheduler Job. The purpose of this job is to run an ElasticSearch Index.
This will not be automatically added on upgrade due to backwards compatibility, however can be enabled via Admin page → Repair →
Repair Schedulers.





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10265](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10265) \- Fix [\#5392](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5392) \- My Filters doesn\`t show up on Project Tasks
* PR: [10266](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10266) \- Fix [\#9563](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9563) \- HTML Type field doesn’t populate
* PR: [10271](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10271) \- Fix [\#373](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM-Core/issues/373) \- Google API Token not working
* PR: [10295](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10295) \- Fix [\#10242](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10242) \- Mass Security Group Assignment fails when multiple items from the same page are chosen
* PR: [10296](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10296) \- Fix \#10296 \- Add duplication logic check on run\_when Always
* PR: [10297](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10297) \- Fix [\#9453](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9453) \- User 'delete' option missing from menu
* PR: [10306](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10306) \- Fix [5906](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5906) \- Currency symbol for currency field in popup is always default
* PR: [10301](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10301) \- Fix [10234](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10234) \- Enum\-type fields may have their values reset to their defaults, if they have non\-blank defaults
* PR: [10300](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10300) \- Fix [\#10302](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10302) \- IMAP INBOUND EMAIL error
* PR: [10299](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10299) \- Fix [\#9853](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9853) \- The "Case Macro" field now appears empty by Default
* PR: [10312](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10312) \- Fix \#10312 \- Group External Connection Changing type on edit
* PR: [10313](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10313) \- Fix \#10313 \- Remove unused line in repair
* PR: [10294](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10294) \- Fix [\#9144](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9144) \- Popup error messages
* PR: [10293](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10293) \- Fix [9858](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9858) \- "Distribution Method" is not retained on Editview Load
* PR: [10292](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10292) \- Fix [\#2833](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2833) \- Process Audit Advanced Search
* PR: [10281](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10281) \- Fix [\#10093](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10093) \- Results are not filtered in the Targets Module popup
* PR: [10278](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10278) \- Fix [\#6397](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/6397) \- Studio: Reset Module: Remove Custom Fields
* PR: [10314](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10314) \- Fix \#10314 \- disabling active languages
* PR: [10283](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10283) \- Fix \#10283 \- When selecting an Outbound Email Account, From/Reply Information should autopopulate for user convenience
* PR: [10308](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10308) \- Fix [\#10307](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10307) \- Retrieve object name via beanfactory
* PR: [10311](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10311) \- Fix [\#10310](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10310) \- Survey reports ui improvements
* PR: [10275](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10275) \- Fix [\#10207](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10207), [\#10209](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10209) \- Multiple Elasticsearch indexing issues

## 7\.14\.2




*Released 14/11/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.2)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6130](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6130) \- LFI to RCE Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6128](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6128) \- Reflected XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6131](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6131) \- Arbitrary File Upload to RCE
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6127](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6127) \- Import XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6126](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6126) \- Dashlet HTML Injection Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6125](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6125) \- PDF XSS Vulnerability
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-6124](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-6124) \- SSRF Vulnerability





#### Enhancements




#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10253](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10253) \- Fix [\#10252](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10252) \- Google Maps Geocoded Counts not displaying properly
* PR: [10248](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10248) \- Fix [\#9537](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9537) \- Activity subpanel isn’t working in a module with a parent\_type / flex relate field
* PR: [10241](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10241) \- Fix [\#9898](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9898) \- Invalid cookie domain when using non\-standard HTTP Port
* PR: [9522](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9522) \- Fix [\#9435](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9435) \- Dropdown doesn’t return empty selected value
* PR: [10246](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10246) \- Fix \#10246 \- non\-admin’s outbound email link not showing
* PR: [10220](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10220) \- Fix \#10220 \- Add Email Body Filtering Selection
* PR: [10212](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10212) \- Fix [\#10199](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10199) \- PHP Fatal error: Uncaught Error: Non\-static method SugarWidgetReportField::\_get\_column\_select()
* PR: [10206](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10206) \- Fix [\#10205](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10205) \- Compatibility hotfix for PHP 8 in ActivitiesRelationship.php
* PR: [10201](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10201) \- Fix [\#9950](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9950) editing Email settings drops TLS SSL selection
* PR: [10160](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10160) \- Fix [\#10159](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10159) \- Accounts \- Not able to search by fax on 'Any Phone' search field
* PR: [10143](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10143) \- Fix \#10143 \- Update ready.php change checking of upload max filesize from \> to \>\=
* PR: [10142](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10142) \- Fix [\#10141](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10141) \- Orphaned Case Attachments bug
* PR: [10122](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10122) \- Fix [\#10115](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10115) \- Wokflow Calculate Action broken under PHP8
* PR: [10114](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10114) \- Fix [\#10114](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10114) \- parameter userTime method in class TimeDate
* PR: [10049](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10049) \- Fix \#10049 \- Relationship::delete expects a string
* PR: [10028](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10028) \- Fix \#10028 \- Allow workflow to send plain text emails
* PR: [10027](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10027) \- Fix \#10027 \- Respect wildcard in front when searching a full name in basic search
* PR: [9964](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9964) \- Fix [\#8980](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8980) \- Check beanFiles for class path
* PR: [9881](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9881) \- Fix [\#9880](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9880) \- Error when importing currency fields with a decimal separator
* PR: [9524](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9524) \- Fix [\#9440](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9440) \- Forcing default null value for numeric core fields
* PR: [9459](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9459) \- Fix [\#9456](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9456) \- choose email provider does not populate SMTP settings
* PR: [9413](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9413) \- Fix [\#9412](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9412) \- Wrong email value displayed when aborting an inline edition
* Unify jquery versions

## 7\.14\.1




*Released 03/10/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.1)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-5351: Stored XSS Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-5351)
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-5353: Improper Access Control](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-5353)
* CVE: [CVE\-2023\-5350: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-5350)





#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [9864](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9864) \- Fix [\#9807](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9807) \- Email import fix
* PR: [9806](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9806) \- Fix [\#9805](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9805) \- Use timezone offset for datetime only
* PR: [9726](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9726) \- Fix [\#9725](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9725) \- Date field value isn’t saved in a Workflow action related module
* PR: [10185](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10185) \- Fix [\#10184](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10184) \- Timezone not set on silent install
* PR: [10140](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10140) \- Fix [\#10139](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10139) \- HTML Text Field tinyMCE version
* PR: [10132](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10132) \- Fix [\#10131](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10131) \- Fix issue with file mode changes not being applied on cache rebuild
* PR: [10110](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10110) \- Fix [\#10109](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10109) \- Add displayParams.initial\_filter to Parent
* PR: [9996](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9996) \- Fix [\#8939](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8939) \- Fix Static call to non\-static method in AOW\_WorkFlow
* PR: [9999](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9999) \- Fix [\#9021](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9021) \- User Preferences Wrong Label
* PR: [10005](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10005) \- Fix [\#9574](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9574) \- Avoid calling method in a static way
* PR: [10058](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10058) \- Fix [\#5390](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5390) \- Redundant message when duplicating a survey
* PR: [10130](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10130) \- Fix [\#10129](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10129) \- Fix issue with step 2 \& 3 on the importer failing
* PR: [10092](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10092) \- Fix [\#9062](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9062) \- Studio layout changes not being reflected
* PR: [10008](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10008) \- Fix [\#10007](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10007) \- Text area cannot span two fields
* PR: [10016](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10016) \- Fix [\#5712](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5712) \- Alerts in the menu bar are not displayed with Night theme
* PR: [10158](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10158) \- Fix [\#10157](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10157) \- Numbering display issue on subpanels
* PR: [10064](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10064) \- Fix [\#3842](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3842) \- Vertical Scroll bar missing in Studio Layouts
* PR: [10102](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10102) \- Fix [\#5385](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5385) \- Fix Closed survey issues
* PR: [10063](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10063) \- Fix [\#2111](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2111) \- Hover over favorites item, shows module name, not label
* PR: [10079](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10079) \- Fix [\#3050](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3050) \- AOW: dropdown lists is not updating (calclulate field \& modified record action)
* PR: [9997](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9997) \- Fix [\#8359](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/8359) \- Fix Contract renewal reminder title is hardcoded
* PR: [9994](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9994) \- Fix [\#9148](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/9148) \- Fix missing sorting labels
* PR: [10020](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10020) \- Fix \#10020 \- Issue with missing label on Contact Module
* PR: [10195](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10195) \- Fix \#10195 \- dropdown keys are not the same type
* PR: [10060](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10060) \- Fix \#10060 \- User preferences detail\-view template issues
* PR: [10120](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10120) \- Fix \#10120 \- Inbound Email Issues
* PR: [9941](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/9941) \- Fix \#9941 \- Remove sugar pro flavor

## 7\.14\.0




*Released 29/08/2023*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.14.0)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Enhancements




#### System Requirement Changes




The minimum php version has been updated to php 8\.1\. The supported versions are now php 8\.1 and 8\.2\.






To visit the SuiteCRM 7\.14\.x Compatibility Matrix please see [here.](../../compatibility-matrix/)





#### Enhancements



##### Smarty Upgrade



Smarty, the templating engine used in SuiteCRM 7\.x, has been upgraded to v4 which brings some minor performance improvements
and better compatibility going forward.





##### PHP 8\.2 Support



This release brings a number of adjustments and updates in order to support PHP 8\.2\.




This includes:




* Removal of deprecated functions/ features
* Updated missing labels
* Update functions to PHP 8\.2 standard
* Fixed Unit \& Acceptance Tests
* Executed Rector to clean up code
* Fixed code to eliminate warnings from logs






#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10116](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10116) \- Fix [\#10053](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10053) \- Issue when creating new tabs on Dashlets
* PR: [10106](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10106) \- Fix [\#10105](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10105) \- Fix 500 error when saving audited numeric field
* PR: [10108](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/10108) \- Fix [\#10107](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/10107) \- Function getRelatedId is unable to return NULL values






### Community

[ibanvaqe](https://github.com/ibanvaqe)

# 7\.15\.x Releases





## 7\.15\.1




*Released 19th March 2026*




### Assets

* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)

### Release Notes



#### Security



* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29189: Improper Access Control](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29189) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-m6x8-3hxp-qxwv) \| Reporter: lighthousekeeper1212
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29100: HTML Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29100) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-g7hf-3j93-rwm5) \| Reporter: Dimitris Mitropoulos, University of Athens and National Infrastructures for Research and Technology \- GRNET
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29098: Path Traversal Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29098) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-6858-fhw5-56gf) \| Reporter: JBince
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29099: SQL Injection Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29099) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-38rf-h37x-7767) \| Reporter: JBince
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29102: RCE Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29102) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-mr5v-wcgr-98qr) \| Reporter: Reuben Seah
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29101: Path Traversal Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29101) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-24pf-9cvh-ppcg) \| Reporter: Reuben Seah
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29105: Open Redirect Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29105) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-9crg-83cg-wv74) \| Reporter: d3dn0v4
* CVE: [CVE\-2026\-29104: Authenticated Arbitrary File Upload Vulnerability](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29104) \| [GitHub Advisory](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/security/advisories/GHSA-5hx9-cmmx-26p3) \| Reporter: d3dn0v4

#### Bug Fixes



* PR: [10753](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10753) \- Added Redis Password and configuration documentation to SugarCacheRedis.php
* PR: [9388](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/9388) \- Optimise Export Memory Usage
* PR: [7317](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/7317) \- Fix [\#7316](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/7316) \- Delete Vardefs files after deleting custom field
* PR: [10751](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10751) \- SugarApplication::redirect adds "Location", calling with "Location" doubles it result is not working
* PR: [10781](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10781) \- Fix [\#10780](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10780) issue with language file being overwritten
* PR: [10089](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10089) \- Fix [\#5722](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/5722) Make SearchForm2\.php customizable
* PR: [10631](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10631) \- Fix [\#10630](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10630) \- Scheduled task “Run Email Reminder Notifications” does not run when deleting a person
* PR: [10707](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10707) \- Fix [\#10621](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10621) \- Localize checkbox values in PDF templates
* PR: [10768](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10768) \- Fix [\#10767](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10767) Image field comes with an extra "10" in image src
* PR: [10677](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10677) \- Fix [\#10676](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10676) \- Remove old query which duplicates email address in table
* PR: [10779](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10779) \- Update Dependencies
* PR: [10514](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10514) \- Fix [\#10513](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10513) \- When field to be updated is email1 then use new logic to update related email account record
* PR: [10761](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10761) \- Fix [\#10759](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/10759) Fix issue with white screen on login after requesting 2nd 2FA code
* PR: [10760](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/pull/10760) \- Fix [\#9450](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues/9450) \- Prevent Spaces in Grouped Report Ids

## 7\.15\.0




*Released 18 December 2025*




### Assets



* [GitHub \- Download](https://github.com/suitecrm/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.15.0)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Install Guide](../../installation-guide/downloading-installing)
* [SuiteCRM 7 Upgrade Guide](../../installation-guide/upgrading)





### Release Notes



#### Lucene Search Deprecation



**Lucene Global Search is now officially deprecated.**




If you currently use Lucene, it will remain functional after the upgrade to 7\.15\.0\. However, we strongly recommend transitioning to an alternative search mechanism, as support will be removed in a future release.





#### System \& PHP Updates



* **Support for PHP 8\.4:** SuiteCRM is now fully compatible with PHP 8\.4\.




	+ In PHP 8\.4, the IMAP extension is no longer bundled. Ensure your environment is configured correctly. [See PHP 8\.4 Change Log](https://www.php.net/releases/8.4/en.php#deprecations_and_bc_breaks).
* **Minimum Version Bump:** To ensure security and performance, the **minimum supported version is now PHP 8\.1**.





#### Better Control Over Email Imports



We have introduced more granular controls for automatic email importing to reduce server load and improve accuracy:




* **Unread Only:** Fetch only unread emails during import.
* **Custom Start Points:** Set a specific starting date/point for new mailbox imports.
* **Threshold Limits:** Define the maximum number of emails imported per scheduled run.




**Global defaults can be managed in **Admin \> Email Settings**, or overridden for individual inbound accounts.**




To see more information on these new configuration options,
please refer to the [Automatic Email Importing](../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/automatic-email-importing) documentation.





#### Advanced Calendar Integration \& Sync



The calendar experience has been overhauled with a focus on interoperability:




* **Calendar Invite Support:** SuiteCRM meeting and call invites now support "Calendar Invite" functionality for both **Google Calendar**, **Outlook** and many more.




	+ When a user receives a SuiteCRM meeting or call invite, they will be able to add the event directly to their calendar with a single click.
* **Admin Sync Settings:** A new dedicated section in the Administration panel for global synchronization behavior.
* **New "Calendar Accounts" Module:** Manage all connections (including new **CalDAV** support) directly from your User Profile.




![Calendar Account Create](/images/en/admin/release/calendar-account-create.png)




To learn more about setting up Calendar integration and the configuration options available, please refer to the [Calendar Configuration](../../../admin/administration-panel/calendar-sync) documentation.





#### Interface \& Developer Enhancements



* **TinyMCE 8:** The text editor has been upgraded to provide a consistent look and feel across all SuiteCRM modules.
* **Responsive Surveys:** Improved CSS styling ensures that Surveys look professional and remain easy to use on mobile devices and tablets.
* **V8 API: OAuth Auth Code Grant:** We now support the **Authorization Code Grant** flow, allowing for more secure, industry\-standard authentication for external applications.




![OAuth Code Grant Popup Authorize](/images/en/admin/release/oauth-code-grant-popup-authorize.png)




To learn more information on what an Auth Code Grant is and how to set it up, please refer to the [OAuth Authorization Code Grant Type](../../../developer/api/developer-setup-guide/configure-authentication#_authorization_code_grant) documentation.





#### Documentation Updates



New or updated guides are available for:




* [Automatic Email Importing](../../../admin/administration-panel/emails/automatic-email-importing)
* Sending Email Invitation for:




	+ [Calls](../../../user/core-modules/calls#_sending_call_email_invitations)
	+ [Meetings](../../../user/core-modules/meetings#_sending_meeting_email_invitations)
* [Calendar Sync](../../../user/calendar-sync/)
* [Setting up your Calendar](../../../user/calendar-sync/user-guide)
* [User Calendar CalDav Setup Guide](../../../user/calendar-sync/caldav-guide/)
* [Calendar Configuration](../../../admin/administration-panel/calendar-sync)
* [Surveys](../../../user/core-modules/surveys#_view_survey)
* [OAuth Authorization Code Grant Type](../../../developer/api/developer-setup-guide/configure-authentication#_authorization_code_grant)






### Community



*Special thanks to the following members for their contributions and participation in this release!*







[![HVStechnik Avatar](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/HVStechnik)](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/HVStechnik)
[HVStechnik](https://github.com/HVStechnik)

[SinergiaCRM](https://github.com/SinergiaCRM)

## 7\.2\.1




*Released this Mar 11, 2015*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.2.1.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.2.1.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Bug Fixes



* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#159 workflow number formatting issues
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#158 \- Currency Formatting Issue when Creating Opportunities from Quotes
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#157 MsSQL compatibility issues
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#156 invalid 'email' column when searching
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#155 missing Project Task dropdown definition
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#154 Product Category \- Parent Category on list view
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#153 \- Forgotten Password Link
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#149 \- Collapsing Studio sidepanels
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#147 Fatal Error when AOP function redeclared
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#142 \- Issues with colour picker
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#141 Next/Previous navigation on Calendar Broken
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#140 Issue with custom currency field in reports
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#138 Theme colour changes only save pressing 'Enter'
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#135 disabled themes can still be used if users current theme
* Fixed \- GitHub issue \#133 Calendar Shared view Items not showing correctly
* Merged currency fix
* Updated PHP version check to check for php 5\.3\+
* Fix for search placeholder language and value default.
* Removed old colour selector from install
* Fix for detail view on mobile to make it more optimal.\*Fix for colour picker default values in SuiteR theme, as some values were incorrect.
* Removing un\-required bootstrap\-theme.css, bootstrap\-theme.css.map, bootstrap\-theme.min.css, bootstrap.css, bootstrap.css.map and Cal.css files from themes/Su$
* Reverting Calendar change as is it causes a bug when navigating to calendar from another module.
* Icons now output directly to the page so they can pickup on the page styles and do not need to load the css for each icon.
* Moved calendar screensize check to cal.js so it only loads on the calendar module.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.2.1) or [click here](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.





---






## 7\.2\.0




*Released Mar 2, 2015*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.2.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.2.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Additional Features



* Responsive theme
* Image Field \- New image field type, allowing adding of image fields via Studio.



##### Enhancements



* **AOP 2\.0**




	+ Add attachments to the case update thread within SuiteCRM.
	+ Better HTML Support.
	+ More Configuration Options.
	+ Re\-open Cases from client email update (Configurable).
	+ Multiple inbound email box set up, allowing assignment of created cases to multiple users.
	+ Further enhancements to cases.
	+ Bug fixes.
* **AOR**




	+ Multiple module relationships.
	+ In\-module and dashlet charts.
	+ Page/column totals.
	+ UI improvements.
	+ Bug fixes
* **Projects**




	+ Gantt Charts added to Projects.
	+ Resource Management added to Projects.
	+ Project Templates added to Projects.




Download here or [click here](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

## 7\.3\.2




*Released Oct 22, 2015*




### Assets

code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.3.2.zip)
