code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.3.2.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Bug Fixes



* Fixed \#416 Studio: New Drop Down List Issue
* Fixed Email user issue in workflow
* Fixed report join issues
* Fixed \#430 Create Calendar entry on mobile view
* Fixed issue \#455
* Prep module builder for php7 compatibility
* Fixed issue \#560
* Fixed partners link in About screen. Fixes \#547
* Fixed issue \#437
* Fixed issue \#360
* Fixed \#512 \- Issue with all/more menu not being scrollable on resolutions that have a height smaller than 700px.
* Remove duplicate hidden input causing issues
* Fixed issue \#506
* Fixed issue \#363
* Update generatePdf.php to avoid blank pages
* Reduced padding on Layout Editor. Previously caused all fields to move to the left side of editor on some resolutions, due to lack of space.
* Removed gap between Quick\-Create Plus on top\-right and its Dropdown. Fixes \#433
* Removed Redundant Code that caused some pages to not load on some Mobile Devices.
* Fixing multiple issues with Calendar and sidebar conflicts, sidebar white space appearing and small CSS fixes.
* Fixed issue \#380
* Fixed issue \#383
* Escaping the ID in the query as it comes from the $\_REQUEST object.
* Adding additional checks on data.
* Adding additional checks on data.
* Fixed all major vulnerabilities
* Fixed issue \#381
* Fixed issue \#353 This fix should be combined with Jims proposal to remove references
* Fixed issue \#305
* Fixed issue \#51
* Fixed injection venerability in the delete function.
* XSS Venerability echoing out request data.
* XSS Venerability
* Adding the City field to the Lead Convert form in the Contact section
* Scrolling in Edit of Layout in Studio/ModuleBuilder not possible
* Update TemplateHandler.php
* Fixed issue 446
* Allow demodata in silent install
* Fixed when login session expires. Alerts now looks for the login form then stops updating the alert manager.
* Fixed \#410 php didnt know to reference the button colour or the actual save button
* Add id\_name to the query in create\_new\_list\_query
* Add id\_name to the query in create\_new\_list\_query
* Skip .git folder on file system checks
* Fixed \#403 \- Dashlets dialog issues on Chrome.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.3.2) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

## 7\.3\.1




*Released Aug 25, 2015*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.3.1.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.3.1.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Bug Fixes



* Fixed \#368 \- Progress message added until Studio Field saving and show results.
* Re\-implementing another bootstrap fix that was overwritten updating to v3\.3\.5\.
* Fixed small issues with top right user menu link moving when screen resizes. Fixing small conflict in Bootstrap CSS.
* Make cookies httponly by default in SugarApplication::setCookie
* Mark the subpanel cookies as httponly
* Mark cookies httponly in the users module.
* Mark the user theme cookie as httponly.
* Use httponly cookies in the facebook social connector.
* Remove the deprecated linkedin code.
* Fixed \#392 \- Issues with Action Menu CSS.
* Fixed \#374 \- AOR Chart Label \- show readable labels on all charts
* Fixing link to wiki/documentation in README.md, updating links to https.
* Implement desired menu icon for mobile navigation.
* Small fixes to menu CSS, adding missing files which were causing errors in console.
* Fixed \#69, Fixed \#197 \- Addressing issues around the print page functionality.
* Fixed \#365 \- Responsive template bugs related to css layers. This also addresses issues with the popup when navigating to Settings → Mail Accounts → Add.
* Ensuring desktop notifications icon/section has its own div ID. It is bad practice to use the same ID twice or more as an ID should be unique.
* Updated Bootstrap to version 3\.3\.5, removed redundant bootstrap.js file from the theme, moved images out of js directory for colour picker and placed in their own directory(so as to not conflict with theme images).
* Removing non\-required input closing tags as this is incorrect syntax.
* Fixed \#210 \- Workflows firing date and 'Run On' select fixed.
* Remove display errors
* Fixed \#181 \- Error with AOR email link fixed
* Added variable which was missing from campaign log \- date\_modified. (clashes with import wizard)
* Remove references to the unknown expenses module from the events subpanel. Related to the 500 error in \#353\.
* Check database name validation in different database types
* Changes to make inline edit work with flexi relationships such as parent on task module
* Fixed \#249 \- sugarcrm\_login.png needs to be changed to suitecrm\_login.png
* Fixed \#351 \- Removed duplicate language entry for LBL\_DELETE\_USER\_CONFIRM.
* Fixed \#359, Fixed \#358\. Issues which cause Calls to crash in Spanish language pack due to trailing comma.
* Fixed \#354 \- Inline editing breaking module builder Vardefs.
* Fixed \#279, Fixed \#300 \- Addresses issues with scrolling on toolbox and panels sections of Studio.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.3.1) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.





---






## 7\.3\.0




*Released Aug 14, 2015*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.3.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.3.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Additional Features



* Inline Editing




	+ Edit fields directly on the List and Detail View by double clicking the field.
	+ To turn inline editing off for a particular field view the field in studio and uncheck "Inline Editing"
* Desktop Notifications




	+ Get Meeting/Calls Notifications direct to your desktop (enable per compatible browser in user preferences)
	+ View missed Notifications in the top bar



##### Enhancements



* Improved Mobile Navigation




	+ New improved mobile menu layout, designed to give you full control, using less screen space.
* Update cases from detail view.
* Numerous workflow enhancements e.g is null, contains etc.
* Numerous reports enhancements e.g date periods, dashlet improvements.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.3) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.4.3.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.4.3.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.4\.3, the latest cutting edge release, introduces the new
reminder meetings functionality.




This functionality allows users to more efficiently manage call and
meeting reminders with the following features:




* Add multiple reminders to a Meeting/Call so that users can be reminded
about a meeting at different intervals.
* Select if all invitees should get a reminder so that users can choose
who to remind about the Meeting/Call.
* Choose people who should not get a reminder so that users can choose
who to remind about the Meeting/Call.
* Ability to select who receives reminders so that no one else is
reminded about the Meeting/Call.




In addition to the Reminder Meetings functionality, there have also been
many bug\-fixes implemented in SuiteCRM 7\.4\.3\.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.4.3) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

## 7\.5\.5

code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5.5.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5.5.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



This release resolves Multiple XSS Vulnerabilities in Yahoo YUI
component \& YUI IO Utility




Removes the use of uploader.swf file (and references) within
self\-hosted YUI library that can be vulnerable to XSS attacks




**Users of ALL previous releases are advised to Upgrade to 7\.5\.5 or 7\.6\.6
as soon as possible**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.5.5) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.




*Special thanks to
[chadbennett](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1724) for
alerting and helping us resolve this vulnerability.*





---






## 7\.5\.4




*Released Jul 4, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5.4.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5.4.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



This release resolves a Security vulnerability with Serialized Input, to
prevent possible object injection attacks




* Removes the option to allow serialized user input to the SuiteCRM Rest
Client.
* Changed serialized User input to use JSON




**Users of ALL previous releases are advised to Upgrade to 7\.5\.4 or 7\.6\.5
as soon as possible**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.5.4) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or visit the official
website to find the appropriate upgrade.




*Special thanks to [Egidio Romano](http://karmainsecurity.com) for alerting
and helping us resolve this vulnerability.*





---

### Release Notes


##### Security



**[SugarCRM version updated to 6\.5\.23](http://support.sugarcrm.com/Documentation/Sugar_Versions/6.5/CE/Sugar_Release_Notes_6.5.23/)**



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#1080](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1080) Activity Stream Setup Undefined index: Facebook/Twitter
* [\#1076](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1076) Clicking through to Opportunities from Outcome By Month Dashlet doesn’t filter correctly
* [\#1074](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1074) Error Clicking Cancel on Show Duplicates page in Leads
* [\#1073](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1073) Issue with clicking through to data on Opportunities By Lead Source By Outcome Dashlet
* [\#1068](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1068) JavaScript setModuleFieldsPendingFinishedCallback is not defined in Reports
* [\#1050](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1050) Difficulty searching on Text Area Fields when using carriage return
* [\#1066](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1066) Reports "Last Month" date period is the same as "This Month" date period
* [\#1057](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1057) Selecting Create Account and cancelling from Home screen goes to error page
* [\#1010](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1010) Calender on Mobile view shows no items
* [\#1053](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1053) Action menu background cleared after save
* [\#724](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/724) Responsive theme glitch at width 981px \- 991px
* [\#1040](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1040) Documentation link 404 error on user wizard
* [\#766](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/766) Timezone issue for Meeting reminders
* [\#929](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/929) Studio Dynamic DropDown not working




**Its is recommended to update to 7\.5\.3 as soon as possible**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.5.3) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

## 7\.5\.0




*Released Jan 18, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.5, the latest cutting edge release, focuses on enhancing the
Reports module. A full list of new functionality is detailed below:




* **Cleaner Reports Interface** \- Making the report writer and results view
more user friendly and less cluttered.
* **AND/OR Conditions** \- Improving your ability to refine results using a
mixture of OR as well as AND logical operators.
* **New Charting Engine** \- Present your report results using eye catching
configurable charts to clearly communicate your intended metrics.
* **Grouped Reports View** \- Grouped Reports view, including dashlets, which
can be expanded/collapsed and grouped on multiple fields.
* **Custom file removal** \- Removing a large volume of files from the custom
directory ensuring only required custom files remain.
* **Formatting Options** \- Display dates and other key fields in a format
effective for your audience.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.5) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.





---

*Released this Jan 11, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5-rc.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.5-rc.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



**This is a beta release and should not be used in a production environment.**




The focus of SuiteCRM 7\.5 is to enhance the functionality of the native
Reports module and introduce new charting functionality/designs.




This release candidate release includes the following new features, as
well as bug\-fixes to the 7\.5 Beta 2 release:




* Enhancements to the User Interface.
* Grouped Report View.
* AND/OR reporting operators.
* New RGraph charting engine.

## 7\.6\.5




*Released Jul 4, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.6.5.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.6.5.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Security



* Resolves a Security vulnerability with Serialized Input, to prevent possible object injection attacks




	+ Removes the option to allow serialized user input to the SuiteCRM Rest Client.
	+ Changed serialized User input to use JSON



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#1642](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/1642)  Modify EmailsUI.php to escape strings containing single quote (\#1642\)
* [\#1623](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1623)  Fixed \#1623 Remove Reminders and Reminders\_Invites from Module Selector and Roles Matrix
* [\#1501](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1501)  Fixed \#1501 Campaign ROI Chart Dashlet doesn’t display
* [\#1389](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1389)  Fixed \#1389 label typo
* [\#1373](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1373)  Fixed \#1373 Add default Security Group for new Records (\#1377\)
* [\#1367](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1367)  Fixed \#1367 Accounts ⇒ Add Contacts to Target List (Multiple Select) (\#1374\)
* [\#999](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/999)  Fixed \#999 changed htmlentitydecode to → html\_entity\_decode (html\_entity\_decode was added as a fix for issue 662\) (\#1095\)
* [\#1121](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1121)  Fixed \#1121 \- Create button missing styling in some areas (\#1212\)
* [\#1385](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1385)  Update AOR\_Report.php (\#1385\)
* [\#1629](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1629)  Fixed \#1629 \- Charts should display Y values on hover (\#1630\)
* [\#1648](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1648)  Bug Fix for audit fields not working with AOW any change. (\#1648\)
* [\#1621](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1621)  Fixed \#1621 \- already opted out targets added to suppressed list
* [\#1457](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1457)  Can’t send text only email template via workflow
* [\#1535](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1535)  Campaigns \- Create Person Form
* [\#1533](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1533)  Missing hour and minute labels from Events
* [\#1620](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1620)  Fixed \#1620 \- Move Inbound/Outbound email settings to more suitable place.
* [\#1618](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1618)  Fixed \#1618 \- Allow sort by email (asc/desc) for contacts in the Target List’s record.
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Give focus to search field saves one click on mobile
* [\#1453](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1453)  Fix \#1453 \- Fixed \- Inline Edit "Assigned To" \- No Assignment Email
* [\#1549](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1549)  Fixed \#1549 \- Dynamic field should have an appropriate value after update.
* [\#1245](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1245)  Fixed \#1245 \- Find related email address for sub panel ordering
* [\#1547](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1547)  Fixed \#1547 \- Campaigns Wizard \- Minor Dialogue Message Error
* [\#1551](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1551)  Fixed \#1551 \- host name added to relative image src’s
* [\#1557](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1557)  Fixed \#1557 \- don’t try to show deleted target lists
* [\#1568](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1568)  Fixed \#1568
* [\#1490](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1490)  Fixed: \#1490\. Calendar Quick Edit now populates the json required for reminders.
* [\#1564](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1564)  Fixed \#1564 \- remove clickable link if target list is not created yet
* [\#1325](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1325)  Fixed \#1325, Fixed \#1538 \- Favorites search does not work with SQL Server
* [\#1539](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1539)  Fixed \#1539 \- Reports pagination fails when using Group By in Mssql
* [\#1519](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1519)  Fixed \#1519 Reports Group by stop working when using a function on other fields
* [\#1520](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1520)  Fixed \#1520 \- Database Failure when Exporting Target Lists \- custom related fields fixed and added to report exporting




**This release resolves a Security vulnerability with Serialized Input, to
prevent possible object injection attacks. Users of ALL previous releases are advised to Upgrade to 7\.5\.4 or 7\.6\.5
as soon as possible**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.6.5) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.




*Special thanks to [Egidio Romano](http://karmainsecurity.com) for alerting
and helping us resolve this vulnerability.*





---






## 7\.6\.4




*Released May 30, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.6.4.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.6.4.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.6\.4 features bug fixes, improves Campaign Wizard UI and
improves Reporting functionality on MSSQL servers



##### Bug Fixes



* Add the budget fields into Campaign Header screen
* Test emails send out immediately (rather than queued)
* Improved UI for creating Email Marketing Records and Templates via the
Wizard
* Update the Campaign Wizard Summary’s interface
* [\#1436](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1436)  Fixed \#1436 \- Reports with nested Parentheses are removing parameters
* [\#1485](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1485)  File includes itself in a loop then exits.leads to apache memory overflow (\#1485\)
* [\#1478](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1478)  fixed: \#1478 making labels translatable
* [\#1435](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1435)  Merge pull request \#1435 from vladbar/issue\_1120\_2
* [\#1431](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1431) Fixed \#1431 \- Person form not passing dropdown custom field
* [\#1120](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1120)  Fixed \#1120 \- fixed email validation for: Accounts → Contacts subpanel → Select → Create Contact → Save. If email is required it should highlight this field and show an error message.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.6.4) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

* [\#1320](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1320)  Fixed \#1320 "One of" condition for multi select does not working

* [\#1302](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1302)  Fixed \#1302 JotPad dashlet doesn’t save text when line break is added

customisations [code
issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1300) when upgrading to 7\.6\.



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#1300](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1300)  Fixed \#1300 \- 7\.6 upgrade \_\_construct incompatible with legacy custom modules and customisations \- write back the old styled constructors to changed files in 7\.6 automatically, constructor arguments and deprecated phpdoc and log message added
* [\#993](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/993)  Fixed \#993 \- SQL Error : Incorrect syntax near 'LIMIT' when using MS SQL Server
* [\#1279](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1279)  Fixed \#1279 Reminder emails still going out later than it should dependant on timezone

## 7\.6\.0




*Released Apr 27, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.6.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.6.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.6, the latest cutting edge release, focuses on enhancing the
functionality of the native Campaign module as well as including the
latest bug fixes.




The release includes the latest enhancements to the following:




* **Campaign Wizard** \- A simplified Campaign Wizard that is easily
understood. Includes an enhanced UI and progress bar.
* **Email Templates** \- The ability to add Tracker Links to Email Templates
while creating the template so that they do not need to be created
beforehand.
* **Web To Lead Form** \- Web\-To\-Lead Forms are now HTML 5 compliant for
easier integration with modern Websites.
* **Target List** \- Create Target Lists of Contacts based on associated
Accounts. This allows for contact lists to be segmented by Account
properties without the need to use a report.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.6) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.





---

* **Campaign Wizard** \- A simplified Campaign Wizard that is easily
understood. Includes an enhanced UI and progress bar.
* **Email Templates** \- The ability to add Tracker Links to Email Templates
while creating the template so that they do not need to be created
beforehand.
* **Web To Lead Form** \- Web\-To\-Lead Forms are now HTML 5 compliant for
easier integration with modern Websites.
* **Target List** \- Create Target Lists of Contacts based on associated
Accounts. This allows for contact lists to be segmented by Account
properties without the need to use a report.

# 7\.7\.x Releases





## 7\.7\.9




*Released Dec 31, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.9.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.9.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Security



* **Security Issue** [\#2831](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2831)  \- PHPMailer Security Issue [CVE\-2016\-10045](https://legalhackers.com/advisories/PHPMailer-Exploit-Remote-Code-Exec-CVE-2016-10045-Vuln-Patch-Bypass.html)



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#2846](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2846)  User Access sub\-panel \- missing module name labels on table fixed
* [\#2842](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2842)  Access tab does not work in USERS module(detailView)
* [\#2438](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2438)  Disable Inline Edit for Line Items
* [\#2761](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2761)  Can Not Select Resources For Project Template
* [\#2031](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2031)  autocompletion of contact field doesn’t work in migration process from lead to contact
* [\#99](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/99)  Issue with apostrophes in search
* [\#126](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/126)  AOS\_PDF\_Templates templateParser guesses the field type
* [\#758](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/758)  Accessing static property ImportFieldSanitize::$createdBeans as non static
* [\#2751](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2751)  Outbound Email Via Campaigns Can Fail
* [\#2718](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2718)  Git Repo causes issues on Windows
* [\#2642](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2642)  changed line 63 to make sure that it applies special formatting if the type of $field\_def is dynamicenum
* [\#573](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/573)  Inline editing \- Workflow
* [\#2445](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2445)  AOS\_Quotes and AOS\_Invoices have some empty language values
* [\#2119](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2119)  Renamed AOW\_Workflow.svg to AOW\_WorkFlow.svg
* Missing Security Group Check in AOW
* Clear Opcache in PHP7
* Undefined parent\_category\_id on Import
* Cases module \- Missing string LBL\_CONTACT\_CREATED\_BY
* Line breaks between words
* Add labels to the fields in Add dashlet \- Web Tab
* ISO4217 code for Mexican Peso from MXM to MXN.




**This release addresses an Important Security Issue and addresses many
other Issues. Users of ALL previous releases are advised to Upgrade to 7\.7\.9 as soon
as possible**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.7.9) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.




*Special thanks to [gunnicom](https://github.com/gunnicom) and
[sk1p](https://github.com/sk1p) for notifying us of the
[security issue](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2831).*

possible object,file, beans and SQL injection attacks



##### Bug Fixes

* [\#958](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/958)  Fixed \#958 \- Ctrl click (open in new tab) does not work in detailview and listview (\#2314\)
* [\#866](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/866)  Fixed \#866 \- Duplicated string \- Include \- case\_status\_default\_key (\#2312\)
* [\#456](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/456)  Fixed \#456 \- No htlm editor in Email / Settings / Signature (\#2300\)

* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Added dialog in the calendar module for tasks. (\#2202\)
* [\#2225](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2225)  Fixed \#2225 \- My\-activity\-stream\-options\-generates\-error (\#2230\)
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  User Profile On Save \- incorrect tab displayed when Email is missing \- task 210 (\#2232\)
* [\#2142](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2142)  Fixed \#2142 Reports Update button css is missing
* [\#2233](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2233)  Fixed \#2233 \- Photo field in Users module incorrect in layout (\#2234\)
* [\#1942](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1942)  Fixed \#1942, task 238 \- margin added to buttons (\#2226\)
* [\#1849](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1849)  Fixed \#1849 \- Quick edit sends AJAX request via GET (\#2021\)
* [\#2154](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2154)  Fixed \#2154 \- Unable to duplicate Project (\#2155\)
* [\#2196](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2196)  Fix \#2196 \- chart dashlet not drawn when there is a single element (\#2197\)
* [\#2177](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2177)  Fixes \#2177 \- Global Search Issue (\#2178\)
* [\#1591](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1591)  Fixed \#1591 \- Redefinition of parameter $fieldRequired (\#1989\)
* [\#2164](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2164)  Fixed \#2164 \- Assignment Notification Repetitive/Arbitrary due to Project.php code (\#2169\)
* [\#2128](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2128)  Fixed \#2128 \- Footer Licence popups Missing in SuiteP (\#2143\)
* [\#1772](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1772)  Bugfix 1772 \- Not Translatable labels (\#1961\)
* [\#1915](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1915)  Fixed\#1915 \- Menu ACTIONS its not translatable \- SuiteP (\#1951\)
* [\#2061](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2061)  responsive theme 'next page' button when multiple 'my cases' exist (SuiteR)
* [\#2035](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2035)  Fixed \#2035 CSV Export of reports didn’t carry out currency calculations (\#2059\)
* [\#1559](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1559)  Fixed \#1559\. Deleting a contact from a meeting doesn’t call the appropriate logic hook (\#2056\)
* [\#2101](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2101)  fixed \#2101 \- Bad html link to site(record information dialogbox) (\#2104\)
* [\#2094](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2094)  Fixed \#2094 iCal now export VTODO and no VEVENT (\#2098\)
* [\#2105](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/2105)  Fixed \- dropdown style in firefox (\#2105\)
* [\#2049](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2049)  7\.7\.2 \- Calendar Activities are off by 1 day

code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.4.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.7\.4 features bug fixes for dropdown editor (browser specific), dashlets, calendar, studio layout updates and improve styling on top bar for non module filter settings.



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Adding Favourites styling \- Removing yellow background for recent edit
* [\#2052](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2052)  Problem with "Repair JS Files" and Calendar
* [\#442](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/442)  Dashboard inside Dashboard \- Double clicking Column Heading on Dashlet
* [\#791](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/791)  Fixed 791 Conversion of Quotes to PDF not show 0 in right side.
* [\#971](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/971)  Converted contact activity doesn’t appear in Calendar
* [\#1958](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1958)  editview layout does not change using module builder on suitecrm 7\.7
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Fix calendar ignoring initial default values
* [\#1958](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1958)  Fixed \#1958 \- Clear tpl cache on a per theme basis.
* [\#1967](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1967)  Basic and Advanced Layout improvement
* [\#2051](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2051)  Dropdown editor broken
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Missing icon from Document Revisions sub panel
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Dashlet Paginations functionally
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Improved Top Menu bar styling for smaller screens and with Module Filter Settings switched off.




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.7.4) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

## 7\.7\.3




*Released Aug 26, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.3.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.3.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.7\.3 includes a fix due to a regression issue with basic
search, this release also includes PHP 5\.3 for Spots modules, fix the
ability to drag Dashlets to multi column Dashboards and have collapsible
subpanels system setting.



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Add 'collapsed subpanels' checkbox to system settings
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Fixed Fatal PHP 5\.3 code syntax for Spots module
* [\#2000](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2000)  Fixed \#2000 \- admin panel for mobile, tablet, laptop, and destkop
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Remove some comments and debug for dashboards
* [\#2030](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2030) Fix basic search form \- able to search via basic search




Download here from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.2.zip)

### Release Notes



SuiteCRM 7\.7\.2 features bug fixes for calendar, php7, MSSQL upgrades and
improves Theme SuiteP UI and functionality



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#1944](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1944)  Fixed 1944 Studio \- Add relationship \- Allows to create unwanted relationship duplicates
* [\#1960](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1960)  Fixed 1960 Calendar Settings are not working as desired
* [\#1923](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1923)  Fixed 1923 7\.7\.1 SuiteP missing icons
* [\#1938](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1938)  Fixed 1938 Calendar issues with Day, Week \& Month views on 7\.7\.1
* [\#1943](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1943)  Fixed 1943 Theme Suite P \- Configure Module Menu Filters not working
* [\#1558](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1558)  Fixed 1558 7\.6\.4 \- AOR \- If row has "Link" checked, the ID is missing from the link
* [\#1878](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1878)  Fixed 1878 Suite P theme Tab/Panel (Edit/Detail View) Major Issues
* [\#1922](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1922)  Fixed 1922 mssql column escape/Quote MSSQL column names when creating tables
* [\#1931](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1931)  Fixed SuiteP Edit/Detail view issue with one field per row (task 229 issue \#1931\)
* [\#1903](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1903)  Fixed \#1903 \- Unable to load Calendar in PHP5\.3
* [\#1749](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1749)  Fixed \#1749 Inline editing does’t work correct with dropdowns and currency fields
* [\#1883](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/1883)  Fixed typo resulting in incorrect executing time delta
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Download notes bug
* [\#1945](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1945)  Fixed \#1945, fix for task 240 'Drop Down Editor is not functioning'
* [\#1928](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1928)  Fixed \#1928 \- restyling the email settings dialog box.
* [\#1854](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1854)  Fixed \#1854 \- Fixed events → delegates subpanel
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  spots ui bug on php7 fixed (tast 221 / forum 10494\)
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  SuiteP footer position fixed (Fix for task 212\)
* [\#1949](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1949)  Fixed style of \* for required fields.
* [\#1939](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1939)  Fixed \#1939 Calendar Fatal error on tasks without Due date
* [\#1029](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1029)  Fixed \#1029 \- prevent user from adding or editing field if the fields name already exists. This fix also works for custom fields.
* [\#](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/)  Fixed \- user names in the calendar titles
* [\#1911](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1911)  Fixed \#1911 \- Removing title case in the style.css




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.7.2) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

## 7\.7\.0




*Released Aug 2, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Security



Includes **[SugarCRM 6\.5\.24](http://support.sugarcrm.com/Documentation/Sugar_Versions/6.5/CE/Sugar_Release_Notes_6.5.24/)**



##### Additional Features



* **SuiteP Theme** \- We want SuiteCRM 7\.7 to be something special this
Summer. Packed with new and improved features and an amazing new UI, it
will transform the way you view SuiteCRM.
* **Analytic Reporting Tool \- "SuiteSpots"** \- Using Drag and Drop
functionality you can create in depth Pivot Tables and charts using your
customer data.
* **Module Group Selection upon Installation Configurations** \- When
installing you can choose which groups of modules you wish to include as
default. This will give users the choice of how what they feel they need
from the word go.
* **Updated** Silent Installer
* **New Calendar** library
* **New Search filter** for Event Delegates subpanel
* **Improved** Project and Project Templates functionality




Download here from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.




*Special thanks for
[adminibt](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1843) for
notifying us of this security update.*

*Released Jul 26, 2016*




### Assets

code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7-rc2.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



**This is a release candidate release and should not be used in a production environment.**




The focus of SuiteCRM 7\.7 Release Candidate 2 is to introduce our new
theme SuiteP (SuitePea).




* Further adding to the SuiteP theme
* Improvements in Project Templates and Projects functionality
* Introducing Business Hours Module
* Search Filter by Events Delegates
* Bug fixes for Email Assignment notifications, Pipeline By Sales Stage
Dashlet, and more.

## 7\.7 Beta




*Released Jun 15, 2016*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7-beta1.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.7-beta1.tar.gz)





### Release Notes



**This is a beta release and should not be used in a production environment.**




The focus of SuiteCRM 7\.7 is to introduce our new Analytical Reporting
Tool \- SuiteSpots, and provide more options upon installing SuiteCRM.




The first Beta release includes enhancements to the following:




* **New Analytic Reporting Tool** \- **SuiteSpots** \- Using Drag and Drop
functionality you can create in depth Pivot Tables and charts using your
customer data.
* **New Module Group Selection upon installation Configurations** \- When
installing you can choose which groups of modules you wish to include as
default. This will give users the choice of what modules they need from
the word go.
* Fixes for Campaigns, Calls/Meetings Reminders and other bugs

* [\#5356](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5356)  Fixed \#5356 \- No marker images in maps
* [\#3826](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3826)  Fixed \#3826 \- Values "OR" \& "AND" in report condition are not translatable

* [\#5393](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5393)  Fixed \#5393 \- The Workflow not started then Line Item was changed
* [\#5574](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5574)  Fixed \#5574 \- Epty email addresses are replaced by previous email in csv file
* [\#5585](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5585)  Fixed \#5585 \- Cannot enable ajax on module after disabling
* [\#5601](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/5601)  Update jj maps
* [\#5280](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5280)  Fixed \#5280 \- Set cookie to remember subpanel collapse status
* [\#5557](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5557)  Fixed \#5557 \- Make dashlet drilldown use the correct key
* [\#5244](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5244)  Fixed \#5244 \- Pass parameter with script tags to sugar evalScript
* [\#5268](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5268)  Fixed \- php notices
* [\#5111](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5111)  Fixed \#5111 \- Date parameters in AOR Reports are not updated
* [\#4351](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4351)  Fixed \#4351 \- notes contacts relation
* [\#5518](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/5518)  Fixed \- Change misleading message in install\_utils.php
* [\#5441](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5441)  Fixed \#5441 \- PDF report not showing image in the image field instead it shows a small red x
* [\#5093](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5093)  Fixed \#5093 \- Emails sent from within SuiteCRM have mis\-matched boundary ids on copy in sent folder.
* [\#5472](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/5472)  Fixed \- Updated documentation links
* [\#5613](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5613)  Fixed \#5613 \- contact detailview js
* [\#5465](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/5465)  Fix Windows cron instructions for cases where a Drive change is required
* [\#5389](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/5389)  Fixed \#5389 \- Only admins can see users availability for meetings in the meeting scheduler
* [\#5597](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/5597)  Fixed \- namespace
* [\#2927](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2927)  Fixed \#2927 \- Emails View Relationship popup collapses on second use
* [\#592](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/592)  Fixed \#592 \- Return: true/false instead of 1/0

### Release Notes


##### Security



* **Security Issue** \- [\#3688](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3688)  Adding escaping to EmailUIAjax.php

* **Security Issue** \- [\#4096](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4096)  System email template access issue
* **Security Issue** \- [\#4094](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4094)  Relationship removal access issue
* **Security Issue** \- [\#3851](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3851)  Improved clean html for sugar fields
* **Security Issue** \- [\#3088](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3088)  Send correct password reset email
* **Security Issue** \- [\#3651](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3651)  Remove delete button in bulk action

* **Security Issue** \- [\#4209](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4209)  Prevents users from inline editing without access
* **Security Issue** \- [\#4102](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4102)  Only an admin user can set admin access for users



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#4140](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4140)  Fix non\-matching delaration of relationship methods in ModuleBuilder
* [\#3903](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3903)  Fixed \#3903 \- use correct charset
* [\#4104](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4104)  Incorrect reference to Suite R\+

* [\#4181](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4181)  Fixes missing labels
* [\#3898](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3898)  Duplicated language strings
* [\#4034](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4034)  Unused language string removal
* [\#3931](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3931)  Case Typo in html entity
* [\#3623](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3623)  Fullcalendar \- Fixing typo on pt\-PT weekdays long format

* [\#3704](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3704)  Fixed \#3704 \- Cannot sort by "Account Name" in "Target Lists ⇒ Details ⇒ Contacts"
* [\#3919](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3919)  Fixed \#3919 \- All archived mails show the same body
* [\#4084](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4084)  Fixed \#4084 \- Option "contains" not available in MultiSelect Field
* [\#4074](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4074)  Fixed installer checkbox html
* [\#4033](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4033)  Fixed \#4033 \- Email DetailView does not show recipient/sender\-data
* [\#4053](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4053)  Fixed \#4053 \- 'send Quote by Email' may send to wrong address
* [\#4101](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4101)  Fixed \#4101 \- Forwarding/Replying to emails sends to your own email address
* [\#4048](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/4048)  Fixed \#4048 \- 7\.9\.4 \- doesn’t close window if you reply to, reply to all, forward to imported email
* [\#3735](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3735)  Fixed \#3735 \- Undefined values using templates from account module in 7\.9\.1
* [\#3791](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3791)  Fixed \#3791 \- Problems with Umlauts in E\-Mail\-Client
* [\#3863](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3863)  Fixed \#3863 \- Umlauts in signature lose encoding in compose\-view
* [\#3420](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3420)  Fixed \#3420 \- Regular user does not reach email address field in Reports module
* [\#4062](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/4062)  AOR Reports: Combined PR for AOR fixes

* [\#3752](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3752)  Fixed \- Attach Doc submits form on firefox
* [\#3646](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3646)  Fixed \#3646 \- Opening email from GMAIL sent folder opens corresponding IMAP uid from INBOX
* [\#3654](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3654)  Fixed \#3654 \- Leftover call to Emails/index.php in v7\.9, breaks "Email Quotation" feature
* [\#3743](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3743)  Fixed \- Cannot select emails with no subject (list view)
* [\#3725](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3725)  Fixed \#3725 \- Default Signature and Email Account Signature




**Users of ALL previous 7\.9\.x releases are advised to Upgrade to 7\.9\.2 as soon as possible.**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.9.2) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.




Checkout our
[SuiteCRM](https://community.suitecrm.com/t/suitecrm-7-9-2-maintenance-patch-now-available/47093)
forum announcement.




We have also updated our Security Process asking the community to send
their security issues directly to us via email
[security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)

## 7\.9\.1




*Released Jun 15, 2017*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.9.1.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.9.1.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Additional Features



* **Check PHP Version** \- Minimum and Recommended PHP Versions upon installation and upgrade
* **Reply To, Reply All, Forward To and Delete** \- [\#3616](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3616)   

This functionality is essentially how you communicate back to your recipient. This functionality can be done via the Detail View of the Email by the Action Buttons.





You can only delete a non Imported Email via the List View and an Imported Email via Detail View.






* **Add Signatures via User Mail Accounts** \- [\#3639](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3639)  

This functionality is different than in the previous email client. A default signature can be set via the User Email Settings (within Profile) or by per Personal Account. There is an additional dropdown when setting/editing a Personal Email Account to select an existing Signature to use. So when you are Composing an Email you can switch between the Mail Account (the From) and the Signature will update accordingly.
* **Import Emails \- set the Assign To \& Relate To via Emails List and Edit View** \- [\#3639](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3639)  

Again, this functionality is visually different from the previous email client but using the standard user interface as other modules. Within the ListView you can select your target emails and Import via the Bulk Actions button. This will open up a pop up and ask to select the appropriate values.





When an Email has been Imported you are able to alter these fields via the standard Edit View of the Record or using the Subpanels on the DetailView. Subpanels are only visible when an Email has been Imported.






* **Flag Emails \- Unread, Read, Priority** [\#3636](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3636)  \& [\#3638](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3638)   

This functionality is again been redesigned to match the similar interface across the application. The User can select their Emails via the List View and flag them appropriately using the Bulks Action menu.





We currently at the time do not Delete Emails from the imap server.






* **Quick Create via Emails** [\#3630](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3630)   

This functionality we felt required again to replicate what we have already in the application – the use of the quick create subpanels. As the subpanels already provide this functionality the user will only be able to create new Records via Emails if the Email itself has been imported thus providing access to the subpanels.



##### Security



* **Security Issue** [\#3698](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3698)  \- Run testinstall.php only via cli



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#3676](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3676)  Fixed \#3676 \- Module builder export and file template.
* [\#1855](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1855)  Fixed \#1855 \- RSS dashlet formatting
* [\#3541](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3541)  Fixed missing label
* [\#3234](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3234)  Fixed \#3234 \- Wrong advanced filter message in Suite7 and SuiteR themes
* [\#3497](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3497)  Fixed \#3497 \- /modules/Tasks/vardefs.php line
* [\#3554](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3554)  Removed unnecessary comment \[language]
* [\#3568](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3568)  Fixed \- Removed unused .php file (jjwg\_Maps)
* [\#3566](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3566)  Resource Calendar \- Days and month are not translated
* [\#3617](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3617)  Imported email in 7\.9 doesn’t show the body text
* [\#3643](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3643)  7\.9\.0 Email: Template’s Subject not replacing Subject content in editor
* [\#3610](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3610)  Cannot import email \- failed to load relationship \- v7\.9\.0
* [\#3641](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3641)  Created date/creator not shown after importing email
* [\#2992](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2992)  Cannot Duplicate Project Template
* [\#3363](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3363)  Export Target List fails (Database failure)
* [\#3599](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/pull/3599)  Order templates by name in AOP admin
* [\#3578](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3578)  Letter to PDF \[Language]




**This release resolves a IMPORTANT Security Vulnerability that effect all
releases of SuiteCRM, all users of ALL previous releases are advised to
Upgrade to 7\.9\.1 or 7\.8\.5 as soon as possible.**




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.9.1) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.




We have also updated our Security Process asking the community to send
their security issues directly to us via email
[security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com)




\_Special thanks to [krzyc](https://github.com/krzyc) for notifying us of
the security issue.

## 7\.9\.0




*Released May 29, 2017*




### Assets



* [**Source
code** (zip)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.9.0.zip)
* [**Source
code** (tar.gz)](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/archive/v7.9.0.tar.gz)





### Release Notes


##### Additional Features



* **Email Client**




	+ New Design for SuiteP
	+ Moved Email Settings into User Profile
	+ Standardised Email Client using SuiteCRM List, Edit and Detail View
	+ Introducing new Compose View
	+ Using new Filters to search Emails (non imported currently)
	+ Compose directly via the ListView without disrupting your workflow
	+ Improved HTML support
	+ Select multiple files on Upload via Compose
	+ Added Attachment support \- icons by type of file
	+ Email Client provides upgrade safe customisations
	+ New message box plugin for creating modals dialogs in SuiteCRM
	+ Set up Group \& Personal emails accounts
	+ Viewing/Moving between Mailboxes (folders)
	+ View, Relate and Edit imported emails
	+ View and Import emails which have not being imported via the List view or the Detail view
	+ Easily pull in an Email Template when Composing
	+ Quickly refresh Current Folder
	+ Compose from the List view from other modules
	+ Compose from the Detail view from other modules
	+ Selecting and Individually Importing Emails
	+ Filtering/Sorting Emails using custom CRM fields
	+ Drafts
	+ Reply To
* **Campaigns**




	+ Ability to set the width of a Mozaik Email Template main container and centred.
	+ Ability to select a User’s preferred Email Template Editor (Direct HTML, Mozaik, and Tiny MCE)
* View Summary provides module grouping and updated styling
* Trace Logging
* Developers can easily add new buttons (BulkActions) and scripts to the List View and Compose View using the same method for existing Detail/Edit View.



##### Bug Fixes



* [\#3515](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3515)  Fixed \#3515 Id. Decision Makers abbreviation
* [\#3499](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3499)  Fixed \#3499 \- SugarBean \- array\_seach function doesn’t use strict parameter
* [\#3470](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3470)  Fixed \#3470 \- Export fails when trying to export all records (DB error)
* [\#3477](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3477)  Fixed \#3477 \- Subtotal Tax
* [\#3478](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3478)  Fixed \#3478 \- Project Templates: Project from Project Title \- language
* [\#636](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/636)  Fixed \#636 \- Reports module: items in the Treeview display lang. label
* [\#3427](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3427)  Fixed \#3427 \- Double spaces in a sentence
* [\#3271](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3271)  Fixed \#3271 \- in File Cal.js in function eventResize "debugger" statement left in code
* [\#3375](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3375)  Fixed \#3375 Report. The errors caused by the conditions of type "field \= ''"
* [\#2483](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2483)  Fixed \#2483 \- User profile image not visible on Employee detail page
* [\#3404](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3404)  Fixed \#3404 \- WizardMarketing.php can’t be moved to custom dir
* [\#3304](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3304)  Fixed \#3304 \- Spots needs UNION ALL when selecting data
* [\#3295](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3295)  Fixed \#3295 \- SugarEmailAddress→addAddress does not set other addresses to non\-primary if $primary parameter is true
* [\#3070](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/3070)  Fixed \#3295 \- Google Maps do not work \- possibly due to Google API Change
* [\#2153](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2153)  Fixed \#3295 \- Images in PDFs not showing
* [\#2145](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2145)  Fixed \#3295 \- URGENT !!! \- Calls \- RELATE TO field record (relationship) is missig after inline edit of Start date\&time
* [\#2058](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2058)  Fixed \#2058 \- Gantt View Page Reload failure
* [\#2053](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2053)  Fixed \#2053 \- Can’t add Spots to Favorites
* [\#2012](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/2012)  Fixed \#2012 \- Studio \- Layouts \- Panel name cannot be edited
* [\#1338](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1338)  Fixed \#1338 \- Print page \- link issue
* [\#1306](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/issues/1306)  Fixed \#1306 \- Image fields from ImageListView.tpl \- module not fetched correctly




Download [here](https://github.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM/releases/tag/v7.9.0) from the SuiteCRM GitHub Repository or
[visit the official website](https://suitecrm.com/download) to find the
appropriate upgrade.

# SuiteCRM Analytics





The new, ready\-to\-use business analytics platform, SuiteCRM Analytics is a fully Open Source and
free\-to\-download solution which was built using Pentaho BI Suite Community Edition and will provide
SuiteCRM users the ability to launch, administrate and customise their own BI platform and is
completely extendable. SuiteCRM Analytics is comprised of two major components:




* [SuiteCRM Data Integration](/admin/suitecrm-analytics/scrm-data-integration/)

* [SuiteCRM Web Analytics](/admin/suitecrm-analytics/scrm-analytics/)














Content is available under [GNU Free Documentation License 1\.3](http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/fdl.html) or later unless otherwise noted.

## Seite 216: Troubleshooting and Support

- **URL:** `https://docs.suitecrm.com/admin/troubleshooting-and-support`

[Issue](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteDocs/issues/new?title=Issue%20about%20Page%20admin/Troubleshooting%20and%20Support.adoc&labels=page-specific&assignee=pgorod "Report an Issue about this Page") 


[Edit this page](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteDocs/edit/master/content/admin/Troubleshooting%20and%20Support.adoc "Edit this page")







 \> [Administrator Guide](/admin/) \> Troubleshooting and Support
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 








# Troubleshooting and Support





## [Diagnostic Tools](#_diagnostic_tools)




SuiteCRM 7 includes built\-in utilities to help you gather technical data before seeking external support.




### [Quick Repair and Rebuild](#_quick_repair_and_rebuild)



The first step for almost any issue. It synchronises the database schema with the metadata files and clears the cached definitions. This is found under **Admin \> Repair**.





### [Diagnostic Tool](#_diagnostic_tool)



Located in **Admin \> Diagnostic Tool**. Use this to package your `config.php`, `phpinfo`, and database schema. This package is essential when requested by technical support to understand your environment without needing direct server access.





### [Log Monitoring](#_log_monitoring)



* **SuiteCRM Log:** Viewable at the bottom of the Admin page or via the filesystem at `/suitecrm.log`.
* **PHP Error Logs:** Usually managed by your web server (Apache/Nginx). These contain the technical details behind system crashes or "White Screen" errors.







## [The Quick\-Fix Map](#_the_quick_fix_map)




When a system issue occurs in SuiteCRM 7, it is commonly related to one of three areas: **Permissions**, **background processes (Cron)**, or **Database/Metadata synchronisation**. Use the guides below to diagnose and resolve common administrative issues.




Identify your symptom to find the relevant resolution guide.









| If you see…​ | Potential Cause | Immediate Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **A "White Screen of Death" (WSOD)** | Fatal PHP Error or Permissions | Check **System Logs** and run **Quick Repair and Rebuild**. |
| **Broken Layouts or missing CSS** | Cache/Permissions issues | Verify **File Permissions** and run **Quick Repair and Rebuild**. |
| **Workflows/Campaigns not sending** | Scheduler or Cron failure | Check **Schedulers** and your server’s **Crontab**. |
| **Missing Fields in the UI** | Metadata out of sync | Run **Quick Repair and Rebuild**. |
| **Users not able to access new modules** | Roles not up to date | Run **Repair Roles**. |
| **Database Errors after an update** | Table schema mismatch | Run **Quick Repair and Rebuild** and scroll to the bottom to **Execute** changes. |





## [Professional \& Community Support](#_professional_community_support)




If the self\-service steps above do not resolve the issue, you can leverage the following resources.




### [SuiteCRM Community Forums](#_suitecrm_community_forums)



The official community forum is a vast knowledge base. When posting, always include your PHP version, SuiteCRM version, and relevant log entries.




* **Visit:** [SuiteCRM Community Forums](https://community.suitecrm.com)





### [Official Professional Support](#_official_professional_support)



For guaranteed response times and expert support from the authors and maintainers, consider accessing official SuiteCRM support provided by **SuiteCRM Ltd** . These offer personalised guidance and reliable, ongoing technical expertise.




* **Visit:** [SuiteCRM Support Services](https://suitecrm.com/enterprise/support-services/)





### [Bug Reporting](#_bug_reporting)



If you have identified a repeatable bug in the core code, please report it via the relevant official GitHub repository.




* **SuiteCRM 7 (Legacy/Hotfix):** <https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM/issues>





Please do not use GitHub for general "How\-to" questions; keep those for the community forums to ensure the developers can focus on code\-level issues.



















Content is available under [GNU Free Documentation License 1\.3](http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/fdl.html) or later unless otherwise noted.

# Technical Blog




## [Preparing for a Larger Upgrade](/blog/larger-upgrades/)



 By pgorod \| July 15, 2019

[admin](/tags/admin)





Usually upgrades are done in small iterations, and we recommend that you upgrade as often as possible.
But we know that if you’re many versions behind the latest, and dealing with a large instance full
of customisations, or having inherited the instance from a predecessor, perhaps with little
documentation, can make the prospect of upgrading a bit more daunting.



[Read More \>](/blog/larger-upgrades/)


## [Creating a Custom SuiteP Sub\-theme](/blog/customizing-subthemes/)



 By pgorod \| September 5, 2018

[development](/tags/development)





Since SuiteCRM 7\.10, the SuiteP theme started to have 4 Sub\-themes called
**Dawn**, **Day**, **Dusk** and **Night**. This article teaches how to "fork"
one of these and start a new Sub\-theme of your own.




I will create a new Sub\-theme called **Noon**, based on **Day**,
and I will make some changes in order to increase the contrast in some parts of the app.



[Read More \>](/blog/customizing-subthemes/)


## [SuiteCRM Super Logger](/blog/suitecrm-super-logger/)



 By Jim Mackin \| July 23, 2018

[development](/tags/development)





I’ve previously created a very simple module for SuiteCRM which adds coloured
logging [(SuiteCRM Super Logger)](/files/suitesuperlogger.zip).
I’ve now expanded it somewhat to add extra features.




It’s now called **SuiteSuperLogger** and allows specifying the log format in the
config. It can be downloaded from the original
[blog post](http://www.jsmackin.co.uk/suitecrm/suitecrm-super-logger/)



[Read More \>](/blog/suitecrm-super-logger/)


## [Creating a custom field type in SuiteCRM](/blog/creating-custom-field-types/)



 By Jim Mackin \| May 3, 2018

[development](/tags/development)





Like a lot of SuiteCRM the field types are customisable and you can add
your own types of fields. This post will explain how to add a colour
picker as a custom field type.



[Read More \>](/blog/creating-custom-field-types/)


## [Scheduler Jobs in SuiteCRM in Linux \- the Definitive Guide](/blog/scheduler-jobs/)



 By pgorod \| April 14, 2017

[admin](/tags/admin)





SuiteCRM uses a number of `Scheduler jobs` that are supposed to run at
scheduled times, supporting functionalities like search indexing,
workflows, email notifications, database maintenance, etc.



[Read More \>](/blog/scheduler-jobs/)


## [ListView Conditional Formatting](/blog/listview-conditional-formatting/)



 By Jim Mackin \| March 4, 2016

[development](/tags/development)





Sometimes you will want to format fields that are shown on the list view
depending on the values. For example you may want to colour the
direction field on calls differently or to highlight quotes that expire
soon.



[Read More \>](/blog/listview-conditional-formatting/)


## [Creating an Alert in SuiteCRM](/blog/creating-an-alert/)

[development](/tags/development)





Alerts in the menu bar are an excellent way of calling user’s attention.
What if you what to create a custom alert through code? It’s easy, here’s how to do it.



[Read More \>](/blog/creating-an-alert/)

# Code of Conduct





## [SuiteCRM Community Code of Conduct](#_suitecrm_community_code_of_conduct)




We understand that in order to have a healthy and inclusive community we need to create and encourage an environment that allows members to feel welcome and safe, learn from each other, and all benefit from the platform. Our SuiteCRM community is made up of end\-users, systems administrators, developers, partners, employees and those providing services for SuiteCRM, so we all must play a part in ensuring the success and well\-being of the community.




1. **Be** **considerate**. Treat people kindly and be helpful. Our community welcomes and supports people of all backgrounds and identities and so should be treated with professional respect. Disrespectful and unacceptable behaviour includes, but is not limited to:




	1. The use of sexualized language or imagery and unwelcome sexual attention or advances
	2. Trolling, insulting/derogatory comments, and personal or political attacks
	3. Public or private harassment
	4. Publishing others' private information, such as a physical or electronic address, without explicit permission
2. **Be objective**. We’re dealing mostly with technical issues here: emotions are human, but please know that negative emotions don’t solve technical problems. Assume other people have the best intentions.
3. **Be responsible.** Ensure that the consequences of your actions are for the good of the project and community. We are community agnostic but we expect users from other communities to be transparent of their affiliation and be conscious of their actions to not detract from the project for personal gain. Members should also respect security best\-practices and aim for solid, maintainable solutions. If you know of any security issues in SuiteCRM, you can email [security@suitecrm.com](mailto:security@suitecrm.com).
4. **Help people learn**. We welcome people of all levels of knowledge. Not understanding basic SuiteCRM features or not knowing how to search for a solution is normal in the beginning, we’ve all been there.
5. **Be Spam Free.** This is an Open Source community, not a marketplace. Don’t advertise services or products. If you’re a partner, add\-on developer, or someone that provides development or consulting services specifically for SuiteCRM then you can inform others about it and answer requests. However, you are not allowed to just advertise without substance or your posts will be regarded as unsolicited spam.
6. **Do your part.** Read Documentation and search for any guides or recommendations before asking, and save other people’s time
7. **Be patient**. Much of what happens in the Community comes from individuals or companies that volunteer their time and effort to the project. It is possible that your question, code contribution or suggestion might not receive an immediate response. Give people time and earn other people’s attention by being a good contributor, not by insisting.
8. **Don’t just take, give**. One of the principles of Open Source is to participate and so a lot of things in our community happen for free, out of goodwill. Do for others what others do for you. There are many different ways to help with code, support, documentation, testing, translating, promoting…




We reserve the right to delete any posts that do not adhere to these guidelines or to ban anyone who repeatedly violates these Guidelines.




These Guidelines applies both within project spaces and in public spaces when an individual is representing the project or its community. Examples of representing a project or community include using an official project e\-mail address, within project forums, posting via an official social media account, or acting as an appointed representative at an online or offline event.




Instances of abusive, harassing or other unacceptable behaviour may be reported by contacting the project team at [community@suitecrm.com](mailto:community@suitecrm.com). All complaints will be reviewed and investigated and will result in a response that is deemed necessary and appropriate to the circumstances. The project team is obligated to maintain confidentiality with regard to the reporter of an incident. Further details of specific enforcement policies may be posted separately.




These Guidelines are adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](http://contributor-covenant.org/), version 1\.4, available [here](http://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/4/).
















Content is available under [GNU Free Documentation License 1\.3](http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/fdl.html) or later unless otherwise noted.

## Seite 220: Bug Fixes

- **URL:** `https://docs.suitecrm.com/community/contributing-code/bugs`
- **Depth:** 2
- **Content SHA256:** `313d27a1b5cf98ca1e9523e5c34e98d4dec866853bb21c3ac04b9378eba4c7ff`

[Issue](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteDocs/issues/new?title=Issue%20about%20Page%20community/contributing-code/Bugs.adoc&labels=page-specific&assignee=pgorod "Report an Issue about this Page") 


[Edit this page](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteDocs/edit/master/content/community/contributing-code/Bugs.adoc "Edit this page")







 \> [Community Guide](/community/) \> [Contributing Code](/community/contributing-code/) \> Bug Fixes
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 








# Bug Fixes





## [Providing a Bug Fix](#_providing_a_bug_fix)




* To provide a code contribution for an issue you will need to set up
your own fork of the SuiteCRM repository, make your code changes, commit
the changes and make a Pull Request to the appropriate branch on the
SuiteCM repository. See our
[Quick Guide to Fork SuiteCRM](../forking/). Once you have set up your forked repository you can
begin making commits to the project.
* When creating a PR to SuiteCRM, you should always direct it to the `hotfix` branch.
* When creating a PR to SuiteCRM 8 you should also direct it to the `hotfix` branch.





The hotfix branch will then be merged into develop which, in turn, will be merged into `master`.







graph TD;
Bugfix{Bugfix}\-\-\>\|Your PR\|hotfix;
hotfix\-\-\>\|Merged Into\|7\.12\.x
hotfix\-\-\>\|Merged Into\|develop;
develop\-\-\>\|Merged Into\| master;



* Separate each issue fix into a new branch in your repository and name it with the issue
ID e.g. *bugfix\_3062* or *issue\-1234*.



e.g. to create the branch from `hotfix` with the following git command:




`git checkout -b bugfix_3062 upstream/hotfix`




e.g. for SuiteCRM 8 this would also be:




`git checkout -b bugfix_3062 upstream/hotfix`
* When committing to your individual bugfix branch, it helps to follow
the message format below:



`Fix #1234 - <the subject of the issue>`




e.g of a commit command




`git commit -m "Fix #1436 - Reports with nested Parentheses are removing parameters"`  





This commit message format allows us to easily include all bug
fixes within major and minor **Release notes**.




If you are new to Writing Commit Messages in git follow the guide
[here](http://chris.beams.io/posts/git-commit/#seven-rules).
* When pushing a branch that has been created from an upstream branch
to your remote fork, you will need to specify "origin", e.g.



`git push origin bugfix_3062`




### [Changing your Pull Request from 7\.10\.x to hotfix](#_changing_your_pull_request_from_7_10_x_to_hotfix)



As of the 31st January 2022 extended support for 7\.10\.x has ended. However, that does not mean that the Pull Request you
created to fix a specific issue or to add a feature is not still applicable!




If the issue you face is still present in 7\.12\.x but your Pull Request is for 7\.10\.x there are some steps below showing
how you can point your Pull Request towards the `hotfix` branch.




1. Checkout your branch that has the intended fix.
`git checkout <your-branch>`
2. Get the hash for the first commit you made from the branch then work your way through until the most recent via:
`git log -1 --format=format:"%H"`



When using the command above, in order to get the hashes from all commits you have made to the branch, you must change
the number `1` to how many commits you have made.
3. Checkout the hotfix branch.
`git checkout hotfix`
4. Checkout a new branch that you will then update the PR to.
`git checkout -b <new-branch>`
5. Cherry\-pick your commits across.
`git cherry-pick commit1 commit2`



`commit1` will be replaced with the hash’s from your commits.




When pushing up a new branch with the same changes as a previous PR made, please reference the newly created Pull Request
in the old Pull Request and then close.




However, if you feel comfortable with git, and you are able to then you can re\-push to the same branch and change the base
branch on the PR to hotfix providing you have rebased.





### [Make a Bug Fix Pull Request](#_make_a_bug_fix_pull_request)



* After you have made your commits and pushed them up to your forked
repository you then create a
[Pull Request](http://help.github.com/articles/using-pull-requests/) to be
reviewed and merged into the SuiteCRM repository. Make a new Pull
Request for each issue you fix – **do not** combine multiple bugfixes into
one Pull Request.
* Ensure that in your Pull Request that the base fork is
**salesagility/SuiteCRM** and base branch is `hotfix`.
For SuiteCRM 8 ensure that the base fork is
**salesagility/SuiteCRM\-Core** and the base branch is `hotfix`.
with the head fork being **your repository** and a base branch of your unique bugfix branch e.g. *bugfix\_1234*
* We will automatically reject any Pull Requests made to the wrong
branch!





### [CLA Check](#_cla_check)



If you have not signed our [CLA](https://cla.suitecrm.com/salesagility/SuiteCRM) (Contributor License Agreement) then your Pull Request will fail a check
and won’t be able to be merged into the project. You will only be required to sign
this once.





### [Travis CI](#_travis_ci)



When a new Pull Request is opened, Travis CI will test the merging of
the origin and upstream branch and update the Pull Request. If this
check fails you can review the test results and resolve accordingly. To
test prior to making a Pull Request install PHPUnit via composer into
your develop environment then cd into the tests directory and run:




`sh runtests.sh`

















Content is available under [GNU Free Documentation License 1\.3](http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/fdl.html) or later unless otherwise noted.

[Issue](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteDocs/issues/new?title=Issue%20about%20Page%20community/contributing-code/Contributor%20Agreement.adoc&labels=page-specific&assignee=pgorod "Report an Issue about this Page") 


[Edit this page](https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteDocs/edit/master/content/community/contributing-code/Contributor%20Agreement.adoc "Edit this page")







 \> [Community Guide](/community/) \> [Contributing Code](/community/contributing-code/) \> Contributor Agreement
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 








# Contributor Agreement





## [Where can I find the Contributor Agreement?](#_where_can_i_find_the_contributor_agreement)




You can find the contributor agreement
[here](https://cla.suitecrm.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM).






## [What is the Contributor Agreement?](#_what_is_the_contributor_agreement)




The Contributor Agreement is a document which outlines the license
agreement between you (the developer) and us (SuiteCRM Ltd) for any
contributions made to the SuiteCRM project.






## [Why do I need to sign it?](#_why_do_i_need_to_sign_it)




We want SuiteCRM to be the biggest, best, long\-term open source CRM
project available globally, so we need to protect the project:




* The Contributor Agreement protects the project and deflects action to
the contributor.
* This means that any legal action for any contributions made to the
project are against Contributor and not Project.
* The Contributor Agreement needs to be signed only once for all pull
requests and contributions in relation to the SuiteCRM project.






## [What next?](#_what_next)




You will be notified by email if your pull request/contribution is
accepted and included in the SuiteCRM project.
















Content is available under [GNU Free Documentation License 1\.3](http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/fdl.html) or later unless otherwise noted.
